reviews.text: John’s knowledge of the law and the resolution of personal injury claims is priceless. Step-by-step he will take you through the process of building a claim, demanding resolution and obtaining results. Without question, he is a master at his craft.

John is an amazing human and truly a great attorney. He mentors other lawyers in the community and I am very grateful for his support.  Small firm with big firm results, he definitely packs a punch. I highly recommend John Mittelman. If anything ever happened to me, he would be one of my first choices to represent me.

John is one of the most amazing people I know. He's caring, genuine, passionate and absolutely committed to understanding the people he represents so that he can show their stories to a jury in a way that will move them to deliver full justice.
I've known John for years. He's an incredible talent. His love for his work doesn't stop inside the Courtroom. He's always working and pushing to make things right for his clients.

John Mittelman is a courageous and competent trial lawyer with whom I have worked several times. John cares deeply about those fortunate to be his clients, as well as the many who may be impacted by his actions. He is a thoughtful, careful practitioner. Highly recommended.
He is a great lawyer.
I have worked with John Mittelman on a number of cases.  He has outstanding legal and tactical  abilities. Attorney Mittelman's strongest point is his passion to represent his clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mr. Selik, it has been my great pleasure to work with you as well!

reviews.text: Failed to file proper paper work.Went to trial he blew a 6Million dollar Med Mal Practice suit.
reviews.ownerResponse: This reviewer was not a client, and the trial did not end with a plaintiff's verdict.  Very unfortunate for everyone, but no trial lawyer wins 100% of their cases.  We always give 150% of our time, skill, and energy to all cases.  I sincerely hope the actual client has been able to move on with his life.  John Mittelman

reviews.text:
Julie Baldwin is the kind of attorney you want in your corner. She’s straightforward, sharp, and incredibly thorough. What really stands out is how present and attentive she is — you’re never left wondering what’s happening with your case or what the next step is.

She has a calm, confident way of handling things that makes a stressful situation feel manageable. You can tell she genuinely takes pride in her work and holds herself to a high standard. She prepares carefully, communicates clearly, and doesn’t waste time.

If you’re in Riverside County and need someone who is both professional and down-to-earth, Julie Baldwin is absolutely someone I would recommend.

If you’re looking for a dedicated and compassionate advocate in Riverside County, I highly recommend Julie Baldwin. She truly stands out for the time, energy, and personal attention she gives to every client she represents.
What makes Julie exceptional is her genuine commitment. She doesn’t treat cases like files on a desk — she treats them like the life-changing matters they are. From the very first consultation, she takes the time to listen carefully, explain the legal process clearly, and ensure her clients feel informed and supported every step of the way.

Her work ethic is evident in the preparation she puts into each case. She is thorough, detail-oriented, and strategic, always striving to achieve the best possible outcome. It’s clear that she invests significant effort behind the scenes — researching, preparing, and advocating tirelessly.

Beyond her legal skill, Julie brings compassion and professionalism to what can be an incredibly stressful experience. She understands the emotional weight her clients carry and approaches each case with patience, respect, and determination.

If you need a defense attorney in Riverside County who will truly fight for you and put in the work your case deserves, Julie Baldwin is someone you can trust and feel confident having in your corner.
I can not say enough about how wonderful Julie is. If you want the experience along with compassion, she is the one! I promise, she won’t disappoint.

Davis Law Group provided outstanding representation for my mother’s accident case—they were incredibly attentive, secured the best possible settlement quickly, and handled everything with professionalism and care.
A special thanks to Janeen, who went above and beyond with her kindness and support, making a stressful process much easier for my mother. The team’s expertise and efficiency delivered exceptional results, and we couldn’t be more grateful. Highly recommend them to anyone needing compassionate and effective legal help.

On behalf of my mother, thank you kindly for your representation,
Attila H.
Jason got in contact super fast and is very knowledgeable. I would highly recommend this firm to everyone! Thank you for the consult!
Jason is really friendly, passionate, and very skilled at what he does, and is happy to help people. 10/10 would recommend!
Able to ask questions and get advice simply by phone ... spent unhurried time explaining and making confusing issues a bit more simple to understand . Highly recommended .

A consult fee of $375 right off the back & once they’ve received the payment they’ll send me the link to the zoom meeting. Anyone with a functional brain would know that this is a scam & I’m pretty sure that they will give up instantly. This is a hard pass for me. Viviana is a nice person though.

My experience with Charles Boylston exceeded all of my expectations. He is incredibly smart and super easy to talk to. He took the time to understand my situation, gave me clear and practical advice, and explained things in a way that was simple to follow. He instantly eased my anxiety surrounding my case. After our very first conversation, I hung up the phone feeling confident, supported and very grateful for his guidance! I absolutely recommend Charles Boylston to anyone needing help with employment-related legal issues and/or advice.
Wants a $300 fee for consultation
Charles and staff are very experienced, took the time to thoroughly understand my complex employment issues and mediated to a fair resolution.  I would highly recommend...

Charles is a wonderful and brilliant lawyer! I have had him as my lawyer for my business for several years now! I will keep him as my lawyer forever! I highly recommend him.
Thank you Charles for all your hard work and dedication to my firm!

I reached out to Mr. Boylston's office for a consultation about a work related issue via their website. By the next day Amber called to reach out and take more information about my concern. She had set up a consultation with Mr. Boylston for the very next day.
Mr. Boylston himself called me to go over my questions. He was polite, friendly and dare I even say honest. Lol. While ultimately I was advised that it would be best not to pursue any further. I truly did appreciate him taking the time to speak with me and go over all my options. Even more appreciated that he personally felt and honestly voiced that it would not be worth my time and effort to go any further.
That's what I mean by honest, instead of trying to convince me of this or that and try to milk money out of me. We had a nice talk, a few good laughs, and I walked a way a little wiser than when I had gone into the conversation. He even advised me of some things I can look into on my own that would cost me nothing.
While I personally was not able to see my problems taken any further, due to this customer service and short but amazing experience, I will definitely know who i will go to first should i ever have an issue like this again.
Called and girl was rude beyond reason . Hard pass glad I didn’t work with
If anyone is in need of a highly competent, knowledgeable. and  trustworthy  attorney, look no further. Mr. Boylston and his staff wonderful.

Charles represented me in 2011 for an employment issue where I was being mistreated. Fast forward to today, I am now am successful corporation owner. Today, I wrote in to ask Charles about a dispute over a consumer refund and he immediately wrote back with a recommendation which scored us a refund of $4K. All parties are now happy and the issue is resolved. Charles provided this information for FREE what kind of lawyer does that?! This also happens to help us sustain our current business during these unprecedented times. Thanks for being awesome Charles!!

Mr. Charles Boylston and his staff have been most helpful with respect to my current legal case. I had reached out to several attorneys seeking legal counsel and advice on my employment situation, and Mr. Charles Boylston and his staff were the first to contact me almost immediately after submitting my inquiry. My initial intake was outstanding and I am very happy with the advice and counsel I was given. I look forward to working with Mr. Boylston further on my case and know that I am in good hands.

I consulted with Mr. Boylston regarding a case of defamation. He was very thorough in giving me the legal definition and examples for each condition that needed to be met. He also gave me information on other areas of avenues to possibly pursue that I was not aware and great advice going forward. He is extremely knowledgeable, very direct and I highly recommend him if you find yourself in need of an attorney. After speaking with him, I know he will be the only one I want to represent  me.

Charles Boylston has been my business attorney for almost 10 years and I have always had a great experience with his company. Being a client of Mr. Boylston’s makes me feel confident as a small business owner when making legal business decisions.

Chad is very thorough and professional. He asks the right questions to drill down on any issues. He is very candid and his advice consists of what you want to hear, but more importantly what you probably don't want to hear. I unequivocally recommend Charles P. Boylston.

Charles was a fabulous find.  He handled an emotionally difficult case with the same passion I had, but taking the emotion out of the equation. When a letter had to be written, he was on top of it, when a decision had to be made, he advised me as if a trusted friend, as opposed to an attorney for hire.  He and Natalie, his legal assistant, are true professionals in every sense of the word!  I would highly recommend Charles for any employment related issues.

Mr. Boylston is very knowledgeable is his area of expertise.  He is not easily intimidated and very thorough in his explanations.  He actually listens to the details of the case at hand and makes sure that the client understands.  He was referred to us by a friend of ours and we are ever so thankful that we listened.  Mr. Boylston's staff is always so ready to assist and actually return calls as soon as humanly possible.  Our most highest recommendations!!!
Charles is hardworking and honest.
FYI there are many attorneys out there that do not charge upfront cost. $250 consultation is absurd

As a result of my first attorney passing, I learned of Mr. Boylston's firm. I wish I had of met him first. Mr. Boylston's firm is the embodiment of his mission statement. I am eternally grateful for his interest, wise counsel and outcome.
Working with Charles had been amazing. Charles was able to help me and my family in a tough, complicated business matter. I am forever grateful to have found him and his company.

Excellent Attorney. Very knowledgable, precise, and concerned about his clients case. As a law enforcement officer, I was skeptical about which attorney to choose for my civil matter. Charles took the time to explain both pros and cons of the issue at hand. He's not all about money. Very humble, yet stern guy. So glad I called.

Attorney Charles Boylston is very professional and helpful. He took my call the first time I called his office. After explaining the my situation and he took the time to expand the process. I'm so grateful I called.
Such a great team of people who care immensely for their clients. They go above and beyond no matter what.

Charles has successfully resolved two separate matters for me. His council is wise, thoughtful and thorough. It's a real pleasure to deal with an attorney who is down to earth, accessible and reliable. If you find yourself needing an attorney, Charles should be your first call!

If you’re re a person that wants their largest asset to be handled by professionals…. You go here. Erica De Los Reyes, her team…. You cannot and will not get any better service and execution of RE transactions in San Diego. Erica has done 2 transactions for me already, nobody better. Thanks , as always

Great escrow and title company. We used them twice and everything worked great. Anna Garcia and Alison Brown were on top of every step form open to close. Great communication, and fast response. Thank you both.

Oh my gosh this is the nicest title company I’ve ever dealt with. I worked with Amanda B. And she is so professional and knowledgeable and so respectful and sweet. I have lots of experience with title companies mortgage companies and other lenders and this by far is the best company I’ve worked with. Thank you again Amanda B.
This company has moved to 41637 Margarita Road, Temecula, Ca 92591
Professional lawyer and compassionate on her cases. I couldn’t be more grateful she helped me in every step of the way.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Sarahi, Thank you for your kind words. It was our pleasure helping you and we are very happy for you!!

reviews.text: Maria Gentz ​​is an excellent lawyer. They were right to recommend her to me. My family and I are very grateful for her great work. She's the best lawyer I've ever had, helping us change our lives. I'm so thankful; she's a blessing. Thank you so much, Maria Gentz. May God bless you. 🙏
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Zaida, we are very happy with the results in your case and appreciate your kind words. Blessings to you as well.

reviews.text: Thank you so much, Attorney Maria Gentz. Your professionalism and efficiency are evident in the results of my case. While other lawyers refused to help me, you did. God bless you. I am truly grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Ana, thank you for your kind words and for trusting our firm to provide you with the best legal representation. We appreciate you very much!

reviews.text: As a new American citizen. I would like to say thank you to Maria for your services. She was great. very informative And made the whole process very easy. She had an answer for every question I had regarding my case. Thanks again Maria I couldn’t be happier.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Pablo, Thank you so much for your kind words!!  We are so glad that you enjoyed the easy process with our firm and are happy with the results!! Thank you again.

reviews.text: Maria has taken on my case since June 2021, and I have been so impressed with her organization and professionalism, she has shown to take care of her clients. Communication with her has been excellent and has always been there to answer any questions or things I would like to talk to her about, whether its over the phone, email or in person. reviews.ownerResponse: Hello! Thank you so much for your amazing review and recommendation!! We take great pride in providing excellent services and keeping our clients informed every step of the way. It has been a pleasure working with you and we are very happy with the positive results!

reviews.text: Mr. Graff was so helpful with some legal advice and representation a few years ago. He was very detail-oriented. He was able to help me reach a higher settlement than I would have before I went to him. The opposing side tried to change their story from what initially happened and what their statement was and Mr. Graff was able to step in an set things straight. So glad I had him represent me or I could have gotten into a lot deeper of a hole. He didn't brush me off or make me feel stupid with all the questions I had. I really felt like he took the time to explain things to me and take my case seriously.
Great guy and very knowledgeable. Would recommend to anyone in need of legal assistance.
Not responsive at all! He would say “ I’ll give you a call tomorrow “ and never did. He gave me the run around for 3 weeks. Waste of time !

DO NOT TRUST THIS ATTORNEY! My daughter lost a family member. We needed assistance on a possible probate issue. I located Mr. Graff when searching for an attorney. Due to COVID, there were no office visits. We were able to contact him over the phone for our consultation. Mr. Graff assured my daughter and I that not only he could take the case, but would give us the outcome we were looking for. He said due to COVID, we would have to meet outside the office to exchange the retainer fee $1350.00. No contract or formal paperwork was exchanged at the time the retainer fee was paid. Due to the stressful circumstances of losing a loved one, we did not question why no contracts were exchanged. Mr.Graff stated he would email us the receipt and other documents, but he never followed through. For over 11 months, we have been calling emailing texting Mr.Graff with no response. He is a crook. He took our money, he took advantage of the circumstances. I will be contacting California state bar, the Better Business Bureau, and possibly the media. This entire experience has ruined our lives. Please do not trust this phony so called attorney. He is shady!!!!!

We are absolutely disappointed in what this lawyer Benjermin Graff has done to our family regarding our case. After speaking to Benjermin Graff and him agreeing to be able to help us, we gave him a $2000 retainer. Our home and livelihood counted on him. I reached out to him multiple times over text, phone calls and messages and so did my husband. We never heard back from him since we gave him a check for $2000 for about a month!
After that month we Finally got a hold of him and he proceeded to give us advice for maybe 10 minutes. And we decided we will move forward with him, since we already paid him. Our case reached a settlement and we have Still heard nothing from mr. Graff For what he has done for our case that we payed him for . And We still cannot get a hold of him to return my money or to provide a breakdown of his work that he has done on our Case file!!!!!
*poor  business
*Would never recommend him to nobody
*Takes your money and does nothing

The King law firm helped me get through a real tough family time, probate is never a fun time. Rachel and her team made the process extremely easy to navigate and got me a very satisfactory result that was perfect for my entire family. I will definitely use this firm from now on.

Rachel was incredibly helpful and supportive while navigating the probate process. She is professional, responsive, and truly cares about the families she works with. Probate can be overwhelming, but Rachel makes everything much easier to understand and handle. I would absolutely recommend her to anyone needing a probate attorney.
Caused me so much unnecessary anxiety and did not follow through on her work or her word.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is always my goal to help my clients under the law. The reality is that sometimes the law isn’t on our side, and in that case, I want clients to know that at the outset before dedicating time, money, and emotional resources on a losing battle.

reviews.text:
Just from the consultation and interactions I have had with Rachel King's secretary Gloria I honestly have to give five stars. Despite the over load of questions, the over explanations, the repeated requests for confirmation on things she already confirmed she still remained calm, patient, understanding and extremely professional.

Rachel King actually was able to cheer me up despite everything going on in my life with a radically based statement that you honestly do not hear quite frequently especially in public in this day an age. Gloria is super professional from the interactions that I had with her. She has a welcoming personality that makes you feel more comfortable to proceed further.

Rachel King is very professional and honestly has a good sense of humor while also remaining factual, strategic, and logistical. Definitely giving major inspiration to maybe take some notes/pointers from just this one interaction.

I will note that Rachel King unfortunately does not take on any clients who are wishing to only do limited scope representation. I believe this is for any case/client but I could have misunderstood her my emotions were quite high haha She may not just do limited scope rep in cases like mine which is... a heavy kind of case to say the least.

I was quoted for a retainer fee of 10k for the gravity of my case so unfortunately despite my very pleasant interaction with her and secretary I cannot go through her. I do recommend her for your case if you need her and can afford her. She recommended some solid legal advice as well as some more affordable lawyers I can work with and possibly do a limited scope rep.

I have to give five stars based off of my consolation with her and the interactions I had with her secretary. But again this is just based off of the 38 minutes of consolation I had with her. Which btw she gave me 8 extra minutes because I think she felt bad for me lol Im not sure if she always does that but I really appreciated   the fact that she had the sympathy to give me more time than what I paid for because she could've charged me for the eight minutes.

Thank you Rachel for your professionalism and all your legal advice. I really appreciate your patience, understanding and sympathy. Thank you Gloria for your welcoming personality and professionalism. I appreciate all of the efforts you guys did for me and I recommend this law firm/attorney. I will definitely be proceeding with Rachel King when I am able to.

Edit: 1/11/2026

So I am going to have to reduce Miss Kings rating by three stars due to the fact she misinformed me on something very important. After reviewing the legal documents she informed me the guardianship of my child was not in fact temporary, my right were not suspended but terminated and the guardianship was permanent. Because of this she quoted me at 10k which I wonder how much the retainer fee would be now if she knew what the judge had just told me not too long ago.

I informed the judge I was not aware I terminated my rights as a parent and thought I was having my rights suspended. Her words verbatim were “This isn’t a permanent guardianship. Your rights aren’t terminated. It becomes permanent when the child gets adopted or the guardianship becomes null and void once the child turns 18 or becomes emancipated before the age of 18.” This misinformation threw me completely off, it affected my health and only to find out none of it was true. There is no specification in the legal documents that say permanent guardianship and the judge confirmed that at our last hearing.

Miss Rachel King I advise you either dive a little more deeper next time to confirm the information you’re providing isn’t false or simply do not do a quick scan in a consultation because you provided false information and I knew from the beginning this guardianship was temporary until you led me to falsely believe otherwise
reviews.ownerResponse: It is true, that your case was in a much more dire situation than initially presented to me. Nonetheless, I’m glad that after we spoke you understood where your case was and the difficulty in achieving your goals. Ultimately legal battles are time consuming, emotionally draining, and expensive. The retainer is not an estimate of costs. I hope you find the representation that suits all of your needs and goals.

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Rachel King. From our initial consultation she demonstrated exceptional professionalism and unwavering dedication. She was always responsive to my questions and concerns, explaining complex legal matters in a clear and easy-to-understand manner. The outcome of my situation was far better than I had anticipated, and I am eternally grateful for her expertise and her heartfelt responses. I would not hesitate to use her again or recommend her to anyone in need of legal help or representation. I don't leave alot of reviews only when truly deserving. She is worth it!!

This lawyer solved my legal problem quickly and efficiently. I could not have hoped for a lawyer to respond and help solved my legal problem so quickly and efficiently and most importantly COST EFFICIENT. I could not have hoped for a better result. I highly recommend Mrs King!!!!! Hands down compassionate responsive out for your best interests!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words ❤️

reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with Rachel King and her team at The Lawyer King law firm, and I can't recommend them enough! Rachel is not only a highly skilled attorney but also truly cares about her clients. She is professional, knowledgeable, and made sure I felt supported throughout the entire process. Her attention to detail and dedication to getting the best possible outcome is unmatched. If you're looking for a reliable, compassionate, and effective attorney, Rachel King is the one to trust.

Rachel King has been a firm advocate for me during an unnecessarily prolonged probate case;  the probate case should have been a simple process but it turned out to be anything but.  Fortunately I had Rachel as my attorney, and while she is not cheap, she is a strong ally and she is knowledgeable and honest and very, very thorough.  Go with the best, I always say.  There was a miscommunication or two, but that is a minor quibble considering all that she brought to the table.   Thank you Rachel, Gloria, et al!

Worst attorney needs to be fired expecially after reading a lot of these 1 star reviews!! I Hired her a few years ago and only talked to her maybe a few times but it was mainly her secretary I spoke too. Just to send a email to write a quick question is about $200 INSANE!! charges 100s of dollars per email ridiculous. Then I told her I don't know if I can afford this anymore and she took it as I had no more money to pay and literally dropped me as a client was told if I want to hire her back it would be a few thousand dollars. I said why would I hire you back after you dropped me in the middle of an important case just because I said it's getting expensive I would think she would of worked with me instead of leaving me out to dry. Very wack and lame. This attorney had no integrity and is money hungry. Thank God I found another attorney at the time that wasn't about money like she was. I couldn't believe she could do that too a client especially a young female like myself. Also they had taken money out like a few hundred dollars and i had to go back to the statements to show i had already paid and was charged again if i wouldnt have went they would of gotten away with taking more money out. Go with legal shield it's a real professional team that literally has your back not like her. I'm saying nothing but facts I wouldn't be surprised if they wrote back with some lies. Jesus knows truth. Very terrible no integrity ain't loyal money hungry exactly what king law firm stood for when they did what they did to me
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm a board certified specialist. My experience and specializations do come at a cost. I'm glad you were able to find an attorney to get your case to completion in a way you are comfortable with and at a cost that works for you.

reviews.text: Wonderful firm, Gloria is the person that took my call and was very helpful. I am glad so glad I found this place!!!

King Law firm seems to be disorganized, unprofessional, unresponsive, and not able to fully represent their clients. It took three years and they still haven't completed a simple conservatorship case in its legal entirety, which was only a simple annual accounting and a change of venue. They continued hearing after hearing on this matter, running up their bill. I trusted them to handle this case professionaly, but they didn't. They also substituted out of my case right a week before a hearing and hadn't notified me of any prior hearings that are in the court notes. If professional representation and communication are important to you, don't hire this team to represent you.

My experience working with King Law firm has been great! Everyone from the receptionist, all staff and Rachel have been very helpful and attentive to my needs. Not to mention, Rachel is very knowledgeable and professional. Thank you!

This firm did not do anything for me except ask for money and keep asking for money.  An associate attorney made statements that were contrary to what Ms King told me.  I will be forwarding all emails to the state bar.  Please research before paying them your hard earned money.

I would like to thank you all for helping us with this issue. Rachel, Megan and the entire staff at the King Law Firm have been very helpful, informative and very nice and professional during this time.
Once again thanks for everything you've done.

Sincerely,
Kenneth Ottaway.

Giving my dads death, and not having done the proper steps to get his property in my name required me to get a lawyer involved. They have been very helpful in getting my dads property into my name, and would highly recommend them to anyone who asks me do I know a good lawyer. Will use them again if I need legal services done.

My case had time restrictions and numerous twists and turns. The team at King Law went above and beyond and were able to get extensions in order to get everything resolved.
Special thanks to Ashton who was amazing! She communicated with me by text and email, as well as Gloria and Megan, so everything could be handled remotely.

My experience with Rachel was terrible. There was zero communication. My case with this firm was open for about 6-7 months and I only spoke to Rachel twice. Any time that I reached out I had to speak with her secretary who is very unorganized. They lost multiple documents and I had to provide the same information over and over again.
I had an interview with the CRD and Rachel was too busy to participate in the interview. They spent zero time preparing me for the interview and this is my first lawsuit so I wasn’t even sure what to expect. They waited until the day of the interview to drop my case and didn’t even have the decency to call me to inform me. I had to hear it from the CRD representative that Rachel was no longer representing me. PLEASE DO NOT WAIST YOUR TIME!! I’m assuming that the positive reviews are from her friends because my experience was a mess from the beginning. If I was able to leave zero stars I would. Find someone else and save yourself the headache. VERY UNPROFESSIONAL.

When my mom passed away without a will in September of 2022 I needed legal counsel for the probate process and spoke to many laywers. I finally found King Law and was assigned Jordan Moir who was my lawyer and Joshua Moore a the law clerk for my case. Both Josh and Jordan were super professional whenever I interacted with them and Josh who I had many interactions with through email and by phone was super responsive each time I had a question or concern. Thank you so much for your help and I highly recommend King Law and Josh and Jordan!
Thank you again dear one's! You are allowing me to advocate for my daughter during a very difficult time! You will never know how much  I appreciate  your help! 🙏🙏❤️❤️

Dishonest, unethical, incompetent, and uncommunicative. Zero stars.
What should have been a simple case dragged on for two years and I was ultimately coerced into a settlement I was dissatisfied with based upon promises from Ms King to reduce her fees and handle reimbursements from her fees, only for her to refuse to honor that agreement and present me with a disbursement agreement paying me appx 25% less than the settlement I agreed to. When confronted with the discrepancy, Ms King became combative and even in the face of text messages documenting her promises, chose to send me a threatening letter to accept the disbursement she was now offering or she would send the funds to court and ask for even more of the settlement she was already stealing from me. Absolute trash as an attorney and as a person, do not hire. If anyone is still considering hiring her and would like specific details or documentation, feel free to message me and I would be happy to provide documentation for the facts above and help you avoid making the same mistake I did in hiring this atrocious firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr Browning,
I am sorry to read your review. Integrity is very important to me. I am required to follow the law. I do not take action on any requests to violate the law or ethics. In fact, I reject any request to violate the law or ethics where I believe there is a potential issue or concern.

reviews.text: I’ve been a client of  Atty. King for several cases. I couldn’t have done without her and her team; helping me with all the problem from estate solution and car title that’s been giving me a headaches for a year. She and her team are very helpful and professional. I’ve been so blessed  to find and Attorney’s that care and seeing you as a person not just an income. The best law firm for all your needs.

She will listen to your needs and in layman language, explain in great detail. If anyone is looking for a knowledgeable and compassionate attorney, then go to Rachel.

Attorney Rachel King was able to help my brother and I when we were going through a complicated and difficult case that required the right attorney for the job. She was able to resolve our case and worked with us at an affordable cost. Thank you for your hard work and all of your much needed help!
sorry but I would and will not be recommending this attorney to any of my friends or family.  All she did was charge charge charge me and really didn't do much

I was lucky enough to find out about Rachel King through a friend of a friend. And Im very grateful for all the help they have given me throughout the hecticness  that was my mom’s sudden passing. Rachel is also certified to practice law in Arizona so it worked out perfect for my weird situation. They can be a little busy sometimes but there is always someone on the phone to help out. I had four cases going on at one point and they tackled them all. I don’t know where I would be without them.
King Law firm just represented me in a lengthy case with trial, and I would have to say I would give then a thousand stars if I could. You want this team on your side!!

I initially decided to go with Rachel because of the reviews. Now I am thinking these are mostly friends and or family members doing the reviews. Communication is basically non existent. The only thing new to your case you will be informed about is your bill. When you call they say "Oh, I was just about to call you". Heard this 3 times. I could go on and on.
King Law Firm handled my mom's and my elder law case. Very happy with the Win for mom's sake! Thank you Rachel King and your entire team. I appreciate you.
Good service provided in a timely manner 👍.
Rachel is absolutely amazing! Not only does she have every answer to all my questions but she was prompt responsive and just overall supportive I highly recommend her services!

I had a consultation with Rachel King two weeks ago and chose this firm because she allowed me to split up the retainer fee. Rachel told me she would be working on filing my forms so I could get a court date on the calendar. A few days later I spoke to Shelly the paralegal who was getting my paperwork started and that it would be filed that Friday. I was excited and sent her everything she asked for. That Thursday I sent Shelly a f/u email but didn’t hear back. I called the office Friday afternoon and spoke to Jennifer (manager?) who informed me that Shelley had left the firm. I was disappointed because no one called to follow up with me. I asked Jennifer when my paperwork would be filed as well as when my next payment was scheduled for. She said she hadn’t ever known Rachel to split up the retainer but that she would call me back to let me know. She never did and all weekend I had such anxiety thinking I made a mistake picking this law firm . Finally I spoke to Jennifer Monday after I called many times that morning. She told me that the forms were ready but that they wouldn’t have me sign them or submit them until I paid the other half of the retainer fee. I was so confused as this is not what I was told by Rachel herself and of course I had every intention to pay as I needed to be represented by them. By this point all trust was gone for me and I asked for a refund. I told Jennifer that I found another lawyer who’s retainer fee was more affordable (As I wanted to file these forms ASAP) That’s when she said well if you can pay them that price we will file it for you at that same amount and you can pay the difference later. I was so shocked and knew that I made the right decision. She said that she was going to subtract $161 for some work that was already done (forms I will never see). I reluctantly said yes and she said she would call me back with information on how it would be sent out to me. When she called back she said the check would be mailed out to me and I confirmed that only $161 would be subtracted and she actually said I’m not sure because the new paralegal Megan was working on it today and I don’t know how much time she put on it. WTH! Their word means nothing here and I am deeply disappointed because I trusted them and not only wasted my time but hard earned money.
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm sorry for the misunderstanding. Our firm is always happy to do what we can to split the retainer and we begin working on your case immediately. However, we do not file court documents until the entire deposit is received.

reviews.text:
I am a military veteran with service connected PTSD.  Years after service I found myself facing three felonies.  After a full mental health panel assessment conducted by the VA and County Mental Health, the charges brought forth against me were found to be correlated with PTSD from my military service.

As such, I was found eligible for County Veterans Court, which is something many veterans, active service members, and civilians do not know exist.  However, Mrs. Ferguson did not only know it existed but she was well versed in presenting cases before Veterans Court itself.

Facing several years in prison, she represented me with professionalism and diligent knowledge of the law.  Additionally, she was polite and reasonably available to quickly bring answers to any questions myself or my family may have had.  From the very beginning she was in great contact with me, as well as her many resources in preparing for my case to be argued before the Superior Court.  As a result, I am not in prison, and, in fact, my felonies will be dismissed and my record will be sealed once I complete the Veterans Court Program.

I am currently well on my way to restructuring my life and move on from this frightful and stressful timeline of events.  Living with PTSD is a forever adjustment.  I am very grateful for people like Suzanne that care considerably for others.  She believes that just because someone has made mistakes, the door of society should not be slammed on them under generalized provisions of law.  Every persons situation is unique and should be treated as such: with unbiased, well researched, and factual discovery.

As a United States Military Veteran I highly recommend Suzanne M. Ferguson as legal representation whether you are a civilian, a veteran, or an active duty service member facing civilian legal issues.

Thank you, Suzanne.  My family thanks you, too.
reviews.ownerResponse: God bless you. You deserve all the best in the world.

reviews.text: Attorney Ferguson is truly amazing! She represented my teenager for traffic court. reviews.text: Suzanne M. Feguson was a beacon of hope to my family at a time when our options appeared limited and the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution seemed nigh on impossible. reviews.text:
I have made several attempts at writing a review to describe just how grateful I am to have recently had Suzanne represent my fiancé; yet, I still struggle to find the appropriate words to convey just how appreciative my fiance, his family, friends, and I are to have had her in our corner. Such words do not exist, it is only an emotion that can be felt.  However, I will do my best to express how retaining Suzanne to represent my fiance in his criminal case was (quite literally) life changing. Having a loved one arrested is hard; having a loved one arrested for a crime that never happened is unbearable.  In my fiance’s case, he was facing a LIFE SENTENCE for a crime he did not commit. I believe other legal representatives may have looked at his case in its totality, and determined it was too much of an uphill battle.  But not Suzanne.  She believed my fiance whole-heartedly and promised him the best defense she could possibly give.  Not only did Suzanne deliver on her promise - she exceeded expectations.  Suzanne has knowledge beyond her years, is one of the most incredible “out-of-the-box” thinkers I have ever encountered, and her attention to detail is uncanny.  Never once did we feel she was not putting her all into my fiance's case.  She is a go-getter who will take all necessary action to prove the innocence of her client.  She is not only there for her clients, but for the family as well. She is totally aware of the hurt and anxiety the family is experiencing, and she was extremely compassionate and was able to keep all of us level-headed.  She taught us to trust the process, and to allow her to do her job.  We knew Suzanne had other cases, but she certainly makes you feel like your case is her one and only.  She was communicative and ALWAYS available.  In difficult times, you rely on your family for support; Suzanne became a HUGE part of our support system.

My fiance was looking at LIFE in prison.  Suzanne believed in his innocence and work relentlessly to prove it.  This case never even went to trial - Suzanne was able to get his charges DISMISSED.  From life to dismissed.  How can you thank someone for that with mere words?
Puneet gets 5 stars from me hands down. She went above and beyond helping me with all questions in a timely manner. I definitely plan to work with her again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the glowing review and the 5 stars! We're thrilled to hear that Puneet was able to help you. We look forward to working with you again soon. If you have any more questions or need assistance, you know where to find us!

Several years ago I was viciously attacked by an unattended dog which had escaped out the front gate onto the sidewalk.  The block was on a rather steep incline and I had gotten off the bike and was walking my bike up the sidewalk when I noticed the dog.  I stopped in my tracks so I would not alarm the loose dog.  Before I realized what was about to happen, the
dog came charging at me, totally unprovoked.  I felt what seemed like a nudge from the dog on my left calf.  I thought, I'd better get the heck out of here before the dog bites me, so I attempted to mount the bike.  When doing so, my left leg was not able to support the weight of my body and I fell to the ground.  As I did so, I noticed that my lower leg was gushing an alarming amount of blood from a huge gash and my sock and shoe were soaked with blood.  I went into shock. nearly fainting.  A neighbor noticed what had occurred and phoned 911.  I was transported to the Emergency Room at Scripps Mercy Hospital and required 23 stitches.
The bite mark was deep and well-defined.  I was lucky enough to find Chris Walton by searing online for he best Personal Injury attorneys in San Diego.  He handled the case from beginning to end with utter professionalism, authenticity, kindness, concern, efficiency and then some.  Although he is a sweet, kind soul, he managed the case with
tenacity and toughness and we settled out of court for a substantial amount, far more than I ever anticipated.  Throughout the process, he would contact me regularly to see how I was healing and feeling.  I told him then, and feel precisely the same way now, that he is a state-of-the-art attorney and that many attorneys could learn a thing or two from him.
Many individuals do not have a particularly high regard for attorneys,
given the stereotype, but they have apparently never met Chris Walton.
He brings to the profession impeccable professionalism, ethics, kindness, and caring.  If you are searching for an attorney to represent you, please look no further, as you have found in Chris an attorney at the highest level of excellence in every way.  If you require additional information, I would be pleased to confer with you; just contact Chris's office and he can supply you with my contact information.  If this reference indicates that I am highly pleased, then it accurately represents how I feel.  Here's to a salubrious outcome for you and your case.

Andrew was outstanding—he resolved my case efficiently and secured a solid settlement. reviews.text: During my divorce, the Law Offices of Donald E. Glass provided me with exceptional service. I appreciated their professionalism and sensitivity during a tough time. I would strongly advise anyone going through a divorce to use their services. Thanks!!!😊😊😊

Wow! I can't believe it's only been a week since I hired the Law Offices of Donald E. Glass to help me with my divorce. They have been so professional and efficient, and I already feel like I have won my case! I am so glad I chose them to represent me, and I would recommend them to anyone in a similar situation.

This was a nearly painless process. It was a great low cost option for an uncontested divorce. A bit strange doing everything either by text message or the funky website, but be persistent and ask questions, and you'll get it done cheaply and quickly.

The assistance I received from the Law Offices of Donald E. Glass has me really pleased. The process for my divorce was swift and effective, and the costs were quite affordable. I would strongly advise anyone in need of legal assistance to contact this business.

Up until the end, I would have rated him 3-4 stars. Response time was quick, although often ranging from abrupt to downright rude. I hired the firm to get my divorce paperwork accepted by the court. Mr. Glass submitted the paperwork and it was rejected by the court. At this point, Mr. Glass refused to accept any responsibility or even the possibility of responsibility. He repeated told me that the court was wrong (I'd like to hear him say that to a judge) and that he was not responsible for the court losing paperwork. Paperwork that can neither be proven to have been sent or to have been lost. Of course, he'll be happy to refile "to please this court" (that's direct quote) for only another $95 filing fee. Sounds like a court fee, right? It's not. He's trying to weasel another $100 out of me rather the follow customer service ethics. Over the course of the conversation (which I forwarded to the Bar Association), MR. Glass became more combative and rude. So rude, that I was convinced I had to be talking to a clerk of some sort. When he refused to give me his name (????) , it became clear that I was actually dealing with the actual attorney. Baffling behavior. I filed a complaint with the Bar Association and the BBB. AVOID THIS MAN LIKE THE PLAGUE!!!!
Very unprofessional, rude, and poor customer service.

I am deeply disappointed in the way that I was treated and the way that my paperwork was handled. I wanted to save money so I went this route hoping and praying that it was legitimate. Somewhere along the way, when the documents that were submitted to the court were rejected three different times, I started asking questions. I started doing some research and making suggestions because things were not getting done and they did not seem to be submitted properly. I was told that I could just walk away from this attorney and go do it myself if I didn't like the way they were doing it. I explained that I was simply trying to understand what was happening and why were we being rejected by the courts every time we tried to submit for divorce. The cover letter that came back from the court was very clear about what the problems were and what boxes were checked incorrectly. This was done by the attorney's office of course. Their answer was always that they were very experienced and it must be the clerk that took the paperwork that was obviously not good at her job. Then when I mentioned something about having to go through the child support department due to my circumstances first prior to filing at the court, I was told that I have been blaming this attorney and that he no longer wants me to be his client because he feels that I am blaming him for things that are not his fault and that it is the court clerk's fault and that they are filing our paperwork incorrectly. I got a lot of excuses and told that other people were at fault and then at the very end I'm told that I no longer have an attorney because I questioned him and did not just trust him when you continually charge me more money again and again after every single attempt to finally Court was rejected due to improper completion of the forums. I am very disappointed and embarrassed that I even ever tried this attorney's online service at all. I don't recommend it and and it left a very bad taste in my mouth especially since I don't have a lot of money to waste and I don't have time to waste either. And after all the time wasting and money wasting he dumped me flat out.
This was what he texted me today after asking him about maybe going to deliver the documents to the child support services first instead of going to the court first because of all of rejections and the explanation on the letter a rejection that we received multiple times:

From Don Glass, Esq - "Hello Cynthia Garcia - Step 5 - Since you continue to blame our law firm for the court's incompetents, it is best that our legal services are hereby canceled and you are now free to handle the case yourself. thanks"
Don and his Team helped me get thru the dissolution of my marriage. Very accommodating and very patient on all of my question.

I am very grateful to them! My husband was physically abusing me, so I wanted to end this relationship with him. My friends helped me to do so virtually. I was able to get divorced with their assistance. Thank you!

The services of Donald Glass esq. were extremely poor and a waste of my time. In my case Mr. Glass said to me in my free consultation that "just because she does not want to split the community property; does not make it uncontested" if he did not want this job he should have just said so and saved all the bad reviews. When I finished the online interview and clicked the review my interview button; did this 25 times nothing happened. In fact the assistants kept texting me MMS messages that did not come through or failed. I told them about this and asked to switch numbers so as to help the process or maybe just have them call me; they did not. All my effort was to no avail. Seems a phone call was too much work for the office of Donald E. Glass esq. and his agents. I spent 2 days filling out the online interview and two weeks trying to contact someone to help me proceed with the process. After several emails with exact questions the only customer service I got was a prompt cancellation and refund of my initial $95 without any reason as to why he had cancelled my legal service. I guess this service only wants the easy low hanging fruit without any complaints or issues. I wish I had listened to the 1 negative review for this attorney and done more research as it appears he was sanctioned in 2000 with an actual loss of license as referenced by Avvo. If you need any assistance or actual legal help do not use this online self-help website. It only amounts to an online automated form filler with an assistant to file your forms once they have been filled out by you. If this is the type of service you need I recommend using a paralegal / LDA form prep service and then filing the professionally completed forms yourself when ready. Again; seriously poor service! Do not use this web service! Too many headaches added to my already heavy load of going through a divorce. Totally not right. This is a repost as Donald E. Glass esq. and agents have labeled my first review as Bogus / False and told to ignore. Quite the opposite, this review couldn't be more TRUE!  if this review is labeled as false or a lie again; as a doctor this will be an actionable case. In my defense this review is completely TRUE and I have all the correspondence to prove any allegation in this review. Seems funny that any negative review on Avvo is automatically labeled as false by the office of Donald E. Glass esq. I guess maybe that suspension in 2000 listed by Avvo must be false as well.
Respond quickly to your needs. Gets the job done !
reviews.ownerResponse: thanks
thanks for the 5 stars... Happy to be of service.

To Whom It May Concern:

This is to let anyone and everyone know how much I appreciated the opportunity to participate in the filing of a bankruptcy with Stephen Darrow. He was truly remarkable to work with in several different ways.

Stephen was knowledgeable, customer service orientated, and had outstanding communication skills. I was able to experience his knowledge and insight on how to approach and structure the bankruptcy. In having done thousands of bankruptcies, he is very aware of the various nuances that need to be addressed and how they need to be handled. He is able to create the proper approach to get the bankruptcy properly filed and to protect the client.

Stephen was also extremely customer service orientated and sensitive to the needs of the client. I was also struck by his ability to communicate clearly and make sure that he understood everyone and was able to address their needs.

Marlene, another important member of the office, played an important assistant role in making sure that everything went well. She was thorough, courteous, and very supportive as she made sure everything was properly prepared before the bankruptcy filing. She is obviously an asset to the company and is someone to be greatly valued.

It should be added that Sharlene, the Legal Assistant, was very considerate and gracious and always made sure that every detail was taken care of as she prepared a number of things to make sure that Stephen had all the material properly organized. Someone who has the knowledge and helpfulness of Sharlene is very difficult to find. Obviously, she is also a very important member of Stephen's organization.

Once again, thank you for the opportunity of dealing with Stephen, Marlene, and Sharlene. I greatly appreciated this. It was my privilege to deal with them and I would recommend that anybody deal with this company as they would be fortunate to do so if they had the need.

Thank you again.

Sincerely,

David Lundell

reviews.text: I really wanted to give these guys a try for my SSDI claim.  I am a 100% disabled veteran.  I contacted them to see if I could get help for my SSDI appeal as I was recently declined.  I submitted a message to them from their website.  My response from Craig A. Fahey was that he will not take my case.  I mentioned that the main impairment that is preventing me from working is my PTSD, depression, and panic attacks, among many other physical impairments.  The fact that I stated that I have had nearly half a dozen ER visits in a couple of months due to these impairments meant nothing.  I contacted Craig to get a better understanding of why my case is not worth their time.  He responded with "the fact that mental impairments are not found disabling unless there are multiple ER visits or psychiatric hospital admissions.  Also, SSA gives very little weight to VA disabilit findings."  Exact quote with the misspelling.  This is after the fact that I specifically stated that I have had so many ER visits due to mental health in their contact form.  So if you are a veteran do not use these guys.  I wouldn't have been upset if they declined my case after speaking to me about it.  Just give me the time for a phone call to at least hear my case, but I wasn't even worth the time to them.  I had multiple emails back and forth with Craig A. Fahey about the matter instead.  It just seems to me that they will not take a case unless they have a high probability of winning.  A veteran that is disabled and seen by the VA hospital is not worth the time to even have a phone call due to "SSA gives very little weight to VA disability findings".  That is not a good reason to deny your services and to not even give me some of your time to speak to.  I, like many other disabled veterans, am trying to make it work after coming from terrible places in the world.. For you!!  I know a lot of us feel abandoned when we get back and it is because of people like this.  Speaking as someone who has had very close friends commit suicide because of their disabilities after war and feeling abandoned when they return home, Craig A. Fahey is the worse type of person. He probably has a good track record of success with the people he accepts as clients but think about all of the impaired people he turns down in order to not tarnish his record.  Despicable!!  It's already hard for us veterans to even apply for disability after what we go through.  But we realize we need to support our family and bury our pride in order to provide for them.  I have a wife and two girls at home I need to care for.  I am not trying to steal from the government.  It's embarrassing that I am not able to work, but I swallow my pride and try to provide for them how I can.  I hope you can go home at night thinking you did some good in your life.  Sorry I was not a "slam dunk" case for you.  As I stated in my email to you, I would appreciate it if you do not try to get my review removed like I have seen you do on other reviews.  This is nothing but the truth and I have your emails to back them up.
Trying to ask questions and she gets hostile at me for trying to ask the difference between California's disability and ssdi.
reviews.ownerResponse: As our receptionist explained to you, we do not practice in the area of California disability and she cannot answer questions about the law since she is not a lawyer.  When she asked for your contact information so she could have one of our lawyers call you, you refused to provide your information and hung up.  Jesus, if you will call back and leave your contact information, we will have one of our attorneys contact you.  Thank you.

reviews.text:
If I had the option to ADD ZERO stars I WOULD. In 2002 I was injured at work. 19yrs. later it came back to haunt me requiring a shoulder surgery. When I was unable to get better after my surgery my surgeon didn't understand because other patients that have this specific surgery got better but it instead things got worse. At that point he didn't know what to do. He told me I needed to go see a specialist. After being passed around from specialist to specialist with multiple diagnosis my primary care doctor made a recommendation that I file for SSDI. The original application was denied. I then filed for a reconsideration. At that point I decided to get an attorney. I called a few one specific was Craig A Fahey he had the nerve to tell me that he couldn't take my case because I was not taking enough drugs. I told him I don't do well with pain medication they make me super sick. He told me that I needed to go back to my doctors and ask them for different drugs other than Norco but I didn't have to take them. Just make sure to pick them up at pharmacy to make sure they are documented in my file. After he reviewed my case he called me back and told me that he COULD NOT take my case because he said he said my case would be denied because I basically don't take enough drugs and thats what the judges look for. He told me that my case would be a waste of his time and it wasn't worth it. That attorney was CRAIG A. FAHEY. I WOULD NOT RECOMMEND him for Social Security Disability. I would not recommend him for anything.
I ended up filing my my own reconsideration at that point and of course I was denied again. My doctors told me I needed to hire an attorney I was so skeptical due to what Craig H Fahey said about my case. I ended up filing for my appeal first then I started to call around to other attorneys and after speaking to ERIC R. HUNT I decided to hire him as my attorney. Our conversation was amazing he made me feel 100% confident as he felt the same. His staff was absolutely amazing. Very easy to work with, communication was perfect, responded to emails fast and messages were returned within minutes or hours. ERIC R. HUNT was awesome! Very knowledgable and very positive about my case. He communicated with me only a few times throughout the process but when he did call he knew everything. I had over 800 medical records that his staff had to gather up and he had to read all of it to fully understand my case.
The appeal with the judge was so easy and went just as he explained. He was on top of it and his testimony to fight my case was right on point. We won my case it was Fully Favorable! I WOULD RECOMMEND ERIC. R HUNT 100% FOR A SOCIAL SECURITY ATTORNEY.... THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING YOU DID FOR ME. I WOULD NOT RECOMMEND CRAIG A. FAHEY for anything. Speaking to him in my opinion was a waste of my time.

Mr. Fahey and his assistant are wonderful. Professional and understanding. Mr. Fahey helped me to  understand the process and gave me realistic expectations for the process of a disability appeal. He won my case and I couldn’t be happier! I highly recommend his service!!!

reviews.text:
Martha is my new favorite person! I had a meltdown yesterday due to a weird random message from SSD in which they denied my claim for “non-medical” reasons. Eight days after I placed my application in the dropbox in their lobby!

Martha talked me off the ledge, had me take a few deep breaths, and told me everything would be okay. She asked questions and really listened to my answers. Then she explained exactly what I needed to do to get answers from SSD. She told me who to call, what to say to them, what questions to ask, and how to keep a record of my interactions with them. I wrote down everything she said. I called my local SSD office  and followed Martha’s instructions. They were very helpful and I got all the information I needed. I wouldn’t have known how to proceed if Martha hadn’t helped me.

During our conversation, Martha messaged Mr. Fahey about my situation and he immediately emailed me to set up a time to talk. In a follow-up email he confirmed that Martha had addressed all my questions and concerns, and I don’t need a lawyer at this time. I agree.  He said he hopes I never need their services, but to contact them if my situation changes or if I have more questions.

I am astounded by the amount of time Martha and Mr. Fahey spent helping me when I’m not even a client of theirs. They showed a level of concern, understanding, and compassion that is absent in almost every professional interaction these days. I highly recommend them.

reviews.text:
It’s unacceptable for an attorney to arrive late on the very first day of court without any communication—especially in a sensitive case involving domestic violence. Instead of being met with professionalism and support, I was met with a nonchalant attitude, as if this was normal.

There were clear mistakes and missed opportunities throughout the case—errors I likely ended up paying for. While this law firm may have strengths in certain areas, I would not recommend them for cases involving domestic violence, restraining orders, or family matters.

As a domestic violence survivor, navigating the legal system is already emotionally exhausting. Hiring an attorney should provide relief, not add to the burden. Unfortunately, that was not my experience. After deciding to reserve the remainder of my trust for my final hearing, I had to substitute out my attorney. Even then, the main attorney never followed up with me or offered any support, which was disheartening and unprofessional.

To date, I’ve spent $7,500. $2,500 of which I paid under the impression that my attorney was prepared for trial. She was not. Had I been properly informed, I might have saved that money for someone actually capable of representing me at my upcoming hearing.

Now, I am without representation, struggling to find a new attorney as my trial approaches, with limited resources left to start over.

This experience has been both financially and emotionally damaging. If I could give negative stars, I absolutely would.

My ex-wife is an attorney and threatened to leave me homeless and penniless in our divorce. Andrew helped me keep my house, my son, and helped with a restraining order against my ex-wife. Highest recommendation!

I found Westover Law Group because I was looking for an attorney to appeal a stipulation I was pressured in to signing in 2020.
My case was so simple and yet my previous attorney could not seem to litigate a stipulation that he wrote.  My ex once again changed jobs and quit paying court ordered support.  My then attorney was negotiating again with opposing counsel.  I was so unhappy and really could not believe what was happening but no other attorney would take the case.  I decided I wanted to appeal the entire case and Westover Law was one of two firms that advertised this specialty.
It was going on two more years when Mr. Westover took over my case without thinking twice.  He did not seem intimidated as other lawyers were.  Within 60 days of hiring Mr. Westover, opposing counsel sent unpaid arrears before we ever went to court.  When we did go to court the opposing party's case was dismissed and the judgement upheld.  Just like that.  I know I should be happy but I am having tremendous sadness about how many years of depression and stress I went through before Mr. Westover took over my case.    My case did not seem complicated and yet I paid 10k and owe 20k to my prior counsel with no results.  I believe Mr. Westover to be very honest and unafraid of a challenge.  I only regret not finding Westover Law Group years sooner.  I am grateful that he took over my case when no one else would.

Best Family Law Attorney in the area.

Mr Westover is truly a life saver who knows the family law. The cost was reasonable and he delivered everything that I wanted in my divorce case. He was unbelievable and know his way around the courtroom which is very reassuring. Highly recommend Mr. Westover.

Avoid at all cost unless you want to waste your money. I retained Taryn to help in the custody battle that I’m been going through with my ex husband. The court date finally came and I never seen the judge. We sat in a room outside of court where she proceeded to hand write what my ex should pay in child support and health insurance. She came late, spent 45 minutes with me (talking about her kids) explained nothing, the billed me for over 2 hours of time that she was not there for. She didn’t address the back child support, the attorneys fees, or the scheduling adjustment that I was wanting. She had me show up in court to complete something that could have been done in her office months earlier. I had to call her pissed off for her to explain why nothing got addressed that day, just for her to bill be for the conversation that should have happened when we were in court

Andrew is sharp as a tac and helped my family and I save thousands of dollars and come to a decision and solve a challenging situation. Hes as sharp and good as they get for lawyers, and is honest. We are happy to have gone to Andrew and his wife and their law group.

He is an amazing person. He spend over one hr with me guiding me and telling me how to not do certain things to waste my money. I have no idea how can someone write a bad review. In fact, he gave free advice which he doesn't have too. He listened and with genuine attention. 🤩🥰
Overbilling, bad communication

By far probably one of the worse family law attorney offices out there. All they care about is your money. They will act like they care about your case and be friendly but do the absolute minimal amount of work possible. They literally charge you for every text message and any type of correspondence. If I could give them negative stars I would. If you want good representation I highly recommend you stay away from these guys.
Honest firm! Took time to review the case and listened to my concerns.
Straight forward, solid advice. Reception is extremely friendly and helpful as well!
Over billed, did not complete tasks that were billed for. Complete bait and switch was not competent or willing to perform the initial task in which services were procured for.

Called to inquire about possible representation regarding an appeal family law matter and he and staff quickly responded to my inquiry with honest information. His staff was very friendly as well and promptly forwarded my information to the attorney for review which I received a response back within just a couple of hours. Will definitely for any legal matters that they practice. Thanks Andrew and Michelle Westover.

First I want to give all praise all glory and all honor to the Most High God Yahweh our heavenly Father through his begotten son the Messiah Yeshua 🙏.
I really appreciate Andrew because he didn't treat me as though I was dollar bills. He was more concerned with righteousness and integrity to lead me in the right direction that would actually not put money in his pocket. That's a quality that is hard to find in this day and time.
I've had first hand experience dealing with a law firm that actually misled me and $12,000 later put me a hole in my pocket and standing in the court. I understand it all too well. So I think and believe that anyone who deals with Andrew you won't be let down.
And Andrew I pray that the good Lord continues to moves in your heart and your life.

Pastor Lonzo Powell

Andrew Westover and his staff were incredible to work with. They offer a portal for communication that allows messaging as well as documentation uploading. I have never walked away from court feeling accomplished, until today! I will be referring his services to anyone I know requiring legal assistance. Thank you again!

Had a successful appointment Andrew heard us out,  Listened ,gave us great advice on how to go the next step.  Knowledgeable,  and experienced what we liked.

Thank you Andrew

Michelle Westover was extremely kind and compassionate about my case. She got me in for a consultation very quick! She assured me her husband Andrew would take good care of me as he does all of his clients. I have my consultation today to discuss my case and I am looking forward to it.

We were very pleased and happy of the comfortably Mr. Andrew presented to us, and his professionalism was very important to us. In the end of our initial meeting, I had seemed to have called on Mr. Andrew by mistake and he was so helpful to point us in the right direction for the proper attorney that we needed. All I can say is Thank You to his Firm and to him for understanding for everything at no time did he just toss us out .. Mr. Andrew showed so much respect for our situation.
THANK YOU.

Westover law was very happy that my situation changed from not seeing my son to seeing him everyday. Westover law happily refunded me most of my retainer. I wouldn’t call anyone but Westover law, if I was going through the same probably again with my  x not letting me see my son. I 100% recommend using Westover law group.
They genuinely care about their clients and clients rights. Westover law=5⭐️

Westover Law Group is exceptional.  My husband asked me for a divorce last week. Unaware of where to begin,  I reached out to Michelle Westover.  She called me days before my consultation just to talk and familiarize herself with my case.  She was kind, respectful, and gave me a sense of comfort I very much needed. I was then fortunate enough to meet with Andrew Westover in his office.  He made me feel at ease right away. He is a brilliant attorney. He explained the process of a divorce and what my rights are. I highly recommend Westover Law Group to meet your needs.

Very Helpful, Positive experience!Well knowledged on Family law and gun laws. Treated like family! Andrew and Michelle were really amazing. Patient and treated us with dignity and respect!Andrew  Helped my father and I through a very stressful situation. Michelle is very warm and friendly and goes above and beyond to help with resources and very helpful with leads as well. Highly recommend to anyone needing legal counsel ,gun laws and advice. Andrew will go out of his way to take care of you !!! Call them you won't regret it !! Victor Vazquez

The day I heard the court's awful ruling in my divorce, I began calling attorneys before I pulled out of the court parking lot.  It was 10x worse than I expected and I needed an appeal.  The attorney I hired to help me failed me miserably.  I made five to six calls a day for nearly a month.  In the few times in my life when I've needed the police or an attorney, it's always been in the worst moments of my life.  Of my many calls to attorneys, I was primarily dealing with impatience, condescension, and sometimes annoyance.  I'm not looking for sympathy, I'm afraid and need help.  Most offer 15 minutes free telephone consultations while others required $1,000 for the first hour.  Mr. Westover allowed a face-to-face consultation and he did something that all the other attorneys would/did not do.  He patiently listened and concentrated on everything I said.  He spent a generous amount of time walking me through my case, explored my potential options, and then outlined all that went wrong.  He basically said the same thing 30 attorneys said but he said it better.  I stopped making calls and am starting to accept my reality.  He's smart and kind.  I truly wish I had found him in my initial search for representation.  I am 100% certain I would be in a much better standing today.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow.   That is probably the kindest and nicest review I have ever received.  You made me smile, and have a small tear in my eye, as I read it this morning.   Thank you.

reviews.text: To say Westover Law Group is simply amazing would be putting it mildly. The staff is informative and the rates are great. I had a great experience with Rebecca Rainwater who helped me! But these people I paid in FULL I have the screen shots and emails confirming this FROM THEM. Months later they are telling me I owe them MUCH more. I did a STIPULATION DOCUMENT and it was filed. $500 was agreed and I paid a little more for fees which was fine. But months later coming back and saying I owe them HUNDREDS more?! Absolutely ridiculous and it is DEFINATLY a scam! Beware- find a better family lawyer unless you want then to keep coming back months/years later asking for more.

The ENTIRE staff is EXCEPTIONAL, professional, caring and HONEST. Andrew and Taryn did a great job and tried very hard to turn a sows ear into a silk purse. We are more than satisfied that they did the best with what they had to start with. Every step was documented and every invoice was itemized and explained. The most honest attorneys I've ever found.

We hired Andrew Westover to represent us on a messy divorce/custody battle with my boyfriend and his ex . He talked a big game and never produced results. We retained him for one month and in that month his ex managed to take his kids away by filing a false restraining order. Mr. Westover used the COVID-19 pandemic as an excuse to not do his job. He never emailed back on time or returned any phone calls on time. We even had the police involved and I called his office asking for him to call us back because it was an emergency and we never heard from him or his wife who is his paralegal. In a month he kept lying to us saying he is about to talk to my ex's lawyer and yet never updated me. Whennwe called to complain about his lack of communication and attention to our case, he kept offering to send us a substitution form to find another lawyer (NOTE TO SELF: any time a lawyer says that, they are not invested in the case and just wanted to take your retainer money... so find a new lawyer ASAP). He lied to us the whole time and then send me a bill for conversations and communications he had with my ex's lawyer. Complete waste of time and money. He does not care about his clients or the impact it has on their personal lives especially when its time for him to give his kids a bath. I would not recommend this man, especially if you are going through a messy divorce with a custody battle. Our new lawyer reached out to the ex's lawyer and with in 2 weeks his kids were back home and things are starting to go in the right direction.

I can now sleep at night because Andrew helped me successfully complete my divorce. He had superb recall of the details of my case and used the law skillfully to get me out of a jam. Very friendly team supports him.  5 stars plus. I’ll forever be grateful. DLHoward

reviews.ownerResponse:
At The Grey Legal Group, we maintain a high level of professionalism and integrity in all interactions. Our team is dedicated to serving our clients with excellence and expects the same level of respect in professional settings.

We welcome meaningful discussions about potential collaborations, but do not appreciate forceful, intrusive, and interrogating questions such as you were posing. Networking events are an opportunity to engage with other like-minded business owners to learn about their businesses and how we can help their businesses grow. In learning about other businesses, we expand our network to be able to share resources with our clients to make their lives better through the connections we make.

We prioritize protecting the privacy and internal operations of our business, just as we do for our clients. Discussing sensitive matters in open forums is unprofessional, which is what your business was asking us to do. In our line of work, that’s akin to breaching confidentiality. Our team members are trained to uphold these standards, ensuring that sensitive matters are handled appropriately.

We encourage those considering our services to experience firsthand the dedication, expertise, and results we provide.

reviews.text: Waste of time! They got all my info and said I will have appointment with a attorney but that never happened! They set up appointment with a assistant that wasn't a lawyer!
