reviews.text:
I hired this law firm to assist me on a very important family custody regarding my ex taking my daughter out of state. As a first responder and a military veteran, I am very well aware on how attorneys function. Such as opposing counsel trying to have my case continued for several months. I informed this law firm of not only my situation but also the play by play that opposing counsel was going to do. I hired this firm in October 2024 and my hearing was held in December 2024. Within those 2 months they charged me just under $9000 and no work was done. This law firm failed to complete my case in December, as they did not work on my case and made mistakes of not serving opposing counsel. The lack and negligence of their concern to my case allowed opposing counsel to have my case continued until February 2025.

After they had the case continued, I told them about my concerns and all they cared was about more money. I told them that I was not going to provide them any more money and if they would like to drop my case to let me know and I would hire another law firm. This firm did not notify me of the standings and only notified opposing counsel that they were no longer representing me. When they notified opposing counsel, this firm had not filed a substitution of attorney. When opposing counsel told about this matter, I was lost and confused at first. I then searched for a better law firm. At this time they have done way more work than this law firm, such as ex partes and visitations (too early to rate them). However, when my new firm started the substitution of attorney, this law firm provided my new attorney false information and filed their own substitution of attorney. The immature act of this law firm delayed my new attorney to take over in a timely manner and it also caused me to lose Winter break visitation days with my daughter.

I called this law firm out on their actions and once again they did not care. All they wanted was more money. I am currently in the process of getting them for legal malpractice. I just want to warn those that are truly fighting for their child(ren) to look for another attorney and not waste your money. If this law firm is capable of stealing from a first responder and military veteran after being provided a play by play, I can only imagine for the hardworking single parents that do not know about the court and custody system.

My case was a simple custody battle with no domestic violence, CPS and/or police contact. All I needed this law firm to do was to complete court documents properly and have them serve those that needed to be serve properly. Especially since my ex alone had violated state laws by taking our daughter out of state without my consent.

Feel free to reach out to me if any questions arise and other documents you would like to see from this horrible law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Marco, we appreciate your feedback and the time you took to share it. Although we cannot confirm details of any matter, we take all input seriously and hope the next steps in your journey go smoothly.

reviews.text: Horrible with communication and representing clients. The Bar will be contacted against a specific attorney in this firm. $$$ and no legal representation in a timely matter.

reviews.text:
ATTN: Father's !!! I've had 3 other lawyers before finding this absolute GODSEND: Grey Legal. Wish I give more than only 5 stars - I knew from my very first consultation with name partner Sharon Tate - she was my knight in shining armor. I have so so so much details as to the difficulty and the irreparable damage my ex has performed on my kids and myself. All I can say is that I relate a lot with Johnny Depp... With mountains of documents to go over and context to understand about my convoluted situation - Sharon and the entire staff at The Grey Legal worked together (With God's hand over them) to pull me out of my deepest, most painful time in my life. Sharon will not beat around any bushes or sugar coat anything. She explains everything to you in a digestible way. Very uncommon with family lawyers, I've found. It usually felt like lawyers will talk over you with legal mombojumbo to make you feel like you should not ask questions to understand. This firm will NOT waste time and money on your case. They do EVERYTHING to get to the point and minimize what they need to charge to get the job done. They will make you feel like family. I know they cared about my kids and the pain they went through.
Sharon has nearly 30 years of experience and she works incredibly hard and the results speak for themselves! She informed me that not only did she take my case (which 3 other lawyers already had their hands on and couldn't win) that already had court orders assigned to it, but that this was by far the most difficult case of her career. . . She also told me that it was the most rewarding because of how much she actually cared about my kids and was determined to bring them back to their father! I went from 3% time share with a paid supervisor with my kids - to 50/50 custody AND she got child support to stop garnishing my wages and got their mom to pay me! W for the boys. . .Trust me, fellas, you do not want to cheap out of fighting for your family - this firm is the absolute best. Don't be stupid, hire them. The entire staff from reception - Mary (who has a long hello intro), to Mr. English, to Irylen, Cassandra, to all the name partners like Sharon - every single person you come in contact with all have the same flavor of professionalism and heart. This is the firm you need and this review is your sign that you need to contact them. Go, what are you waiting for?!

If you're searching for a domestic violence attorney who combines knowledge, compassion, and true dedication, Justine Fuller is the one. I highly recommend her to anyone in need of legal support in such a difficult and sensitive matter.

Once again, thank you, Justine, for being a true life-saver in my journey to justice. Your impact goes beyond words, and I am forever grateful for your exceptional service.

I am so happy that I hired Dustin as my divorce attorney,  he is a very calm and detailed person. He listens everything you say during the conversation and this is very important cuz not many people knows “how to listen “

I have interviewed few divorce attorneys before Dustin , but after I had first initial consultation with him , I knew right away this is the attorney that I am looking for , thank you so much Dustin it has been a pleasure working with you!

Dustin Krogh has been a blessing to our lives. Amazing!!!! Highly recommended

I am in the middle of a contested divorce and false accusations were made against me to get a temporary restraining order in order gain an advantage in a divorce and custody battle. If a restraining order had been granted I would have lost my job as a Federal Agent and I would of lost my USMC reserve retirement at 19 years of service.  The other party tried to offer a deal for a 2 year temporary with an exemption to carry a weapon only at work. Dustin explained the pros and cons of accepting such a deal plus the risks of going to trial. I decided that I was not willing to compromise my integrity and honor by accepting a deal built on lies. I decided to put my faith in Dustin, and go to trial. During a week long trial against a very capable and aggressive downtown San Diego lawyer, Dustin calmly articulated our case before the judge and countered emotional arguments with facts, evidence, and the law. When opposing counsel made wild claims, he used undeniable evidence we had collected to prove the other party was lying. His closing arguments were so well spoken and so detailed that he refuted every argument opposing counsel had made. He did this point by point, in the most detailed and articulate manner. He was so smooth I almost felt as if it was a court scene from a movie based on a John Grisham novel. I owe Dustin forever for saving my career, my reputation, and really my life. He is brutally honest, highly capable, and yet he will not resort to low brow tactics.  He will fight for you like lion, but he will always do so in the most honorable manner. I can’t say enough about Dustin Krogh and his firm, Camarata and Fuller.

Going through a divorce is of course, not an easy battle. Picking a lawyer is not only a challenge but finding the right match is a rare fit for what I was looking for, until I found Dustin Krogh.

When I first got in contact with Dustin Krogh. I knew he was the right choice to make from his previous experience and being in the military which put him as my top choice in regards to my divorce. The knowledge, patience, and care he had for my case went above my expectations. Not only does he know his craft but his statements to the opposing party were amazingly executed. Georgie Toerner was apart of the team in answering any questions and helping with questions on any forms that needed to be filled out. Thank goodness that Toerner was there or else. I would have struggled. The team as a whole not only settled my nerves but gave me HOPE. I can finally say now after my case is finally done, how satisfied I am with their service.

Not only did I WIN but I got my settlement that I wanted. Thank you for your service :)

I have nothing but fantastic things to say about this law firm. Dustin helped me with my case and he is absolutely amazing. He answered me in a timely manner, fought hard and treated me more than just a number. If you need a lawyer I highly recommend this firm you will get great lawyers that care about you!

Dustin was nothing short of world-class and provided excellent, professional, and prompt service for me. Thanks to his outstanding knowledge of the legal system, his great communication, and his empathy for what I was going through, I was able to navigate the challenging process smoothly from beginning to end. I would recommend Camarata & Fuller, especially Dustin, to anyone.

I sought out Camarata & Fuller based on reviews after having a terrible experience with another attorney. Dustin handled my case and it was very emotionally sensitive and complicated. Everything that I explained to Dustin in regards to the concerns I had with my first attorney, he made sure that he addressed. Dustin made me feel extremely comfortable, safe, and well represented throughout my case. He was extremely knowledgable and honest about the judge that was assigned to my case, the laws surrounding the situation, the feasibility of what I was trying to accomplish, and he found the best, most reasonable solutions to everything I asked him to address. He was extremely responsive, professional, and genuinely wanted me to have the best outcome given my unfortunate situation with a very difficult and malicious opposing party. I cannot put into words how highly I recommend his services and how wonderful of a job he did with my case. Most of all, I am forever thankful for the peace of mind he gave me while working with me that greatly reduced my anxiety during a very difficult time, it truly had a huge impact on how I was able to handle what I was going through.

Justine is the best attorney for anyone going through a divorce, child custody issues, or that are victims of domestic violence. I hired Justine due to an unexpected divorce that changed the lives of my kids and I overnight. From the day I first met Justine, she took the time to listen and empathize with me as she could tell that it was a very stressful and emotional time for me. She fought extremely hard for my kids and I to ensure that I would retain sole custody. This was all before I knew that I would also need her services to represent my kids and I in seeking a domestic violence restraining order. She fought extremely hard for my restraining order as she simultaneously fought for my divorce. I have to say that as a single father, I was a little worried of what to expect in court at first. It is extremely rewarding to know that there are attorneys out there like Justine that will take cases personally, and put in the time, effort, and passion to represent you. I not only retained sole custody of my kids, but my kids and I retained everything through our divorce. Most importantly, my kids and I could not be happier now! Thank you Justine from the bottom of my heart!

I was very fortunate to have found Dustin Krogh during a terrible custody battle. I followed Dustin from a previous firm and I could not have been happier doing so. To best describe it, I was being engulfed by a dumpster fire starting in 2018 and Dustin turned out to be the best firefighter around. He wasn't only professional, responsive and courteous. He was passionate and held the highest standards for himself. I'll always appreciate his kindness and intelligence in his profession.

Justine gave me the peace of mind I needed. After a long and contentious divorce process caused by my previous attorney, Justine focused on what is important. Divorce is a painful process—Justine understands that and will complete your divorce. She will fight for you, and provide you realistic and reasonable expectations.

She and her staff were very responsive and professional. I highly recommend Justine Marren and her staff of professionals.

Dustin Krogh has been my lawyer since my divorce and most recently into a child custody case with a move away. I really couldn’t be happier with him and his firm! He was always responsive and timely.

I feel like I need to say this next part because I’m not a fan of having to do anything inside a courtroom or with Lawyers in general but he actually cared about me. Not just the case and the face value of the challenges it brought but me. He handled everything cleanly, gave phenomenal advice and helped me through some very tight and tough times. For perspective I’m a Dad in the state of California fighting custody of 2 kids and moving with them out of state.

Through the whole process he kept me grounded, set my expectations accurately, and maintained a professional decorum that I appreciate and admire!  If I could give 10 stars I would.

Mr. Camarata represented us in a child support case that was stressful and exhausting. After trying to work it out on our own with minimal results, we decided it was best to involve an attorney. Literally within a few hours Mr. Camarata had worked out a stipulation that was fair to both parties, and we were able to avoid going through the stress of court and having to deal with DCSS. My family and I would not hesitate to recommend Mr. Camarata for their professionalism and efficacy. If you need someone who is honest about potential outcomes in court and the experience to provide insightful and wise counsel, you need look no further than Joseph Camarata and his team.

I've hired a few lawyers over the years and have been disappointed, but I cannot give enough stars to Justine and her team for their help. I was recently faced with a serious family matter and Justine more than helped me. She was professional, extremely knowledgeable, and confident. When I was nervous and at times scared, her confidence was reassuring. She knew that I had a winning case but still kept my expectations inline with reality. I was informed every step of the way and received all the advice one could ask for. That level of honesty is hard to find these days.

When all was said and done, the results were better than I had expected and it was the greatest feeling of relief I have every had. It was money WELL spent.  I cannot say enough about Justine but I will close with this: Should you choose Camarata & Fuller, You won't regret it.

I felt like I was at an all time low with my custody battle and there was just nothing more I could do.

I had spoke with Dustin and he assured me we were able to get things done. He was so quick to let me know all of my options and let me decide what was best for me.

He worked fast and was very attentive to my case. He along with his firm handled my case quickly and helped me get out of my funk.

Thank you Dustin and Camarata & Fuller for all that you have done. I definitely would recommend.

Dustin is the best! I was going through a rough divorce and then child custody and child support for years. I first worked with a different attorney, where I felt I was not being heard and treated as "just another client". I was exhausted and frustrated with the system and the attorney's. When I had had enough, I made a consultation with Dustin Krogh and immediately felt relief during our conversation. He took time and was clear in explaining the process. I felt protected with his experience and knowledge, yet "heard" and safe knowing he was there for me, my children and what is right. He is professional, patient, and understanding. I highly recommend Attorney, Joseph Camarata. He handled my wife's custody case with the utmost professionalism.

I am still in the middle of my case so I can not explain details. I will add them in the future. But I will say, Joseph has been phenomenal. He works quickly and is very responsive, which I appreciate. I highly recommend!

Justine helped me finish a tedious divorce process. She made my life easier by easing uncertainty and anxiety created by my previous attorney. Her staff provides amazing service. They are personable, prompt and kind. Divorce is an ugly experience and it is nice to have someone on your side that isn't only out to fight and create a bigger problem. Justine works to get a divorce accomplished with the least amount of conflict. All while looking out for your best interest

My ex wife attempted to have a restraining order issued against me. In court, Mr. Camarata was relentless in attacking the opposition's case.  Sadly, I've been in court with my ex wife numerous times. I haven't seen a lawyer so aggressively go after my accuser, or her lawyer. He never gave them time to breathe. While my ex wife was on the stand, he successfully objected to virtually EVERY question her lawyer asked her.

When it was his turn to question her directly, he completely picked apart their case. I ALMOST felt sorry for her. He turned up the heat so much that eventually, she was unable to answer simple "yes or no" questions without taking several minutes to do so. He even managed to successfully object to a dishonest answer that my ex wife tried to give to a question he asked. Her lawyer then complained to the judge in a weak effort to make it appear that Mr. Camarata was objecting to his own question, rather than the answer to it. The judge himself took time out to teach her that she was mistaken.

By the end  of  questioning, my ex wife, who began with an arrogant posture, had taken on a glassy eyed, blank, deer caught in the headlights expression.

Having been thoroughly outclassed and outfought, the opposition could only resort to underhanded tactics and cheap shots. They tried to have meaningless bits of evidence admitted at the last moment, in an obvious attempt to keep him off balance. He didn't miss a beat and got the judge to reject it every time.

They also tried to force my son's therapist to be a witness against me. They went so far as to say the therapist herself felt threatened by me. He quickly uncovered the truth. He showed that she not only wasn't threatened by me, but that she didn't appreciate the opposition's lack of honesty.

In the end, Mr. Camarata was able to get the case dismissed without my needing to take the stand. In the final moments, all the opposing "attorney" could do was make unprofessional remarks under her breath as she and my ex wife left the court room with their tails between their legs and heads hanging in utter defeat.

As for his paralegal, Lisa Mora, she is very professional and caring. She was always there for me to provide help and quick answers to all of my questions and problems. They both have my highest recommendation.

Such a great,  hard-fighting team! They ensured that I was taken care of and understood options as I live out of state. They helped me with a custody change and they were very knowledgeable on the matter. I cannot thank them enough with the patience they have had with me and the matter. I highly recommend this great team for any legal matter that you may encounter. I promise you they will walk with you every step of the way.

Joe and Lisa do an excellent job. I had a rough relationship with my ex wife going through our divorce. Joe was there for me with answers to all of my questions. He showed up in court and made sure I received the best possible visitation with my children that was possible.

When it was time to divide up the marital assets and debts Lisa took the time to explain every detail of the settlement to myself and my ex. As hostel as our exchanges had been Lisa managed to get everything settled in a day with an agreement we both could accept.

I cannot say enough good things about their work and support during my case.I highly recommend them to anyone going through a divorce.

Please pay attention to all the 1 star reviews!! I was promised an amount to get me to the point we are at now and it's doubled that. I would not recommend Matt Vincent to anyone for a divorce attorney. As bad as going through a divorce is, dealing with Mr. Vincent and his staff was even worse. It’s sad that someone like this is in a position to take advantage of someone during a legal process when they hired him to help them.

very disappointed. If you are going through a divorce or custody battle and want someone who truly cares AND knows how to win, Dustin Krogh is the one you want on your side. Five stars doesn’t feel like enough — he gave me peace of mind during the hardest chapter of my life

I would like to share my experience with the Law Office of NancyRose Hernandez Employment Law and the exceptional service provided by Attorney Hernandez and her team. I never imagined that navigating a legal matter through mediation could be such an empowering, supportive, and ultimately positive journey.

Throughout the process, the communication I received was consistently clear, purposeful, and focused on the essential matters at hand—never burdening me with unnecessary details or legal complexities. Attorney Hernandez and her team operated as a steady source of peace, guidance, and protection, allowing me to remain centered and focused on my well-being while they handled the intricacies of the case.

My experience with Attorney Hernandez is one I will always hold in high regard. Her professionalism, sincere compassion, and impeccable ethical conduct reflect a rare combination of both legal excellence and genuine humanity. The same is true of Jeanne Monte, Paralegal, and Erin Harriman, Legal Assistant & Marketer, who served as my primary points of contact. Their integrity, steadiness, and unwavering respect for me as a client were evident in every interaction. Although I did not speak with Ilyssa Stackhouse as often, she too demonstrated exceptional kindness and professionalism. Working with this team was an absolute privilege.

At the conclusion of a successful outcome, I was deeply moved by Attorney Hernandez’s words of encouragement—reminding me to stand tall, heal, and move forward, allowing the past to remain behind me and embracing the promise of a positive future. Her sincerity and honesty brought closure, clarity, and comfort in a way few professionals ever achieve.

If you find yourself in need of legal representation, I wholeheartedly encourage you to entrust your concerns to the Law Office of NancyRose Hernandez. Whether your case concludes exactly as you hope or takes a different path, you will emerge feeling stronger, more empowered, and genuinely supported by a team that operates with integrity, transparency, and unwavering commitment to their clients.

I offer my most sincere accolades and deepest appreciation to this extraordinary team. They embody true professionalism—grounded in honesty, compassion, and respect. Without question, they are exceptional.

Review for The Law Office of Nancyrose Hernandez

I am thrilled to share my exceptional experience with The Law Office of Nancyrose Hernandez. From the moment I engaged their services, I knew I was in good hands. Their commitment to professionalism, communication, and compassion sets them apart from other firms.

Throughout my case, I was impressed by their prompt and clear communication, ensuring I was always well-informed and educated on the process. This attentiveness significantly reduced my stress and anxiety.

Each team member at the firm went above and beyond to provide outstanding service:

- Nancyrose Hernandez, Attorney:** Ms. Hernandez consistently addressed my concerns and questions promptly, displaying a wealth of knowledge, patience, and professionalism.

- Jeanne Monte, Paralegal:** Jeanne's dedication, hard work, and knowledge are unparalleled. One instance that stands out was when she went above and beyond by working over the weekend to ensure we met a crucial deadline for my case. Her willingness to sacrifice her personal time demonstrates not only her professionalism but also her genuine care and concern for her clients. Jeanne's attention to detail and tireless work ethic were essential in ensuring that all necessary documents were prepared accurately and submitted on time. She is the MVP of paralegals and made my experience manageable and positive.

- Erin Harriman, Legal Assistant:** Erin's professionalism and effective communication skills ensured my needs were always addressed promptly and courteously.

I wholeheartedly recommend The Law Office of Nancyrose Hernandez to anyone in need of exceptional legal representation. Their commitment to client satisfaction and outstanding service is second to none. I am confident that their outstanding service will be the norm for anyone who engages their firm. Jeanne Monte's dedication, along with the entire team's exceptional service, makes this law firm an outstanding choice for legal representation.

In conclusion, if I had to choose one word to describe my personal experience with The Law Office of Nancyrose Hernandez, it would be "advocate." As Justice Thurgood Marshall eloquently stated, "The lawyer is not merely an advocate for the client, but an advocate for justice, for the law must always serve the people with equity." The Law Office of Nancyrose Hernandez embodies this spirit of advocacy, and I am immensely grateful for their unwavering support and guidance throughout my case. In the words of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, "The advocate is not merely a mouthpiece; they are an instrument of justice, entrusted to uphold the law and pursue fairness." This law firm truly fights for what is right, and as Barack Obama said, "To be an advocate is to embrace the fight for what is right, even when the odds seem insurmountable." The Law Office of Nancyrose Hernandez has earned my utmost respect and gratitude for their relentless pursuit of justice and fairness.

Gratefully,
Enoch Greene

Back in July 2024 my mother passed away at home. Unfortunately, she had no Trust or Will in place to let everyone know what her wishes were with regard to her home and modest assets. I contacted TheAshcraftfirm after checking several advertisements for probate firms. I don’t know why I selected Greg Ashcraft’s Firm, maybe because they also handled Trusts, I can’t recall, but I am very happy with my choice. Greg’s team I interacted with were Greg, Nancee, Kelsey and Justin. The probate process sucks. Period. Not going to sugar coat that. However, Kelsey, a paralegal, at TheAshcraftfirm did a great job keeping me the Administrator and my siblings thoroughly informed on what to expect and she made the bitter pill of the State requirements easier to handle with her kindness and compassion. I have zero complaints. If and when you have to call the firm, most often you will speak with the Office Manager Justin who is very easy to communicate with. I felt they had my back. I had to deal with an eviction, which they do not handle but steered me in the right direction. The initial cost to get the process started is a modest investment up front to cover court filings and other necessary paperwork, other than the small amount up front the firm gets zero until the final petition is approved and signed by the appointed judge. In our case that was 20 months. We loved the Ashcraftfirm so much, we hired them to put together our family Trust.
Thank you so much Greg, Kelsey, Justin and Nancee.

Sincerely,
Steven and Brenda Gray

If they were in fact representing the other party and had not disclosed this to us, that strikes me as grounds for a California Bar sanction. Truly revolting “professionals."

Im very grateful for having Albretch & Albrecht law office as my representation. Jon Albretch demonstarted an amazing work ethic and professionalism. If You have a Legit Work Comp Case, She is Your Go to Attorney. My Case took 3 Years and She and Her Team, Guided Me threw it all. And the Results Were Excellent!!

Called about a workers comp case and the secretary would not take my information because she stated that it was a waste of time.  I’ve been through hell and back the past 4 years but that interaction was horrible.  I already have a settlement offer but need to retain council for compensation.  All I’m looking for is council and guidance willing to pay for quality but attorney Kathryn’s office was not it.

Kathryn and her staff have been a God send.
Can't thank them enough.

Kathryn and her staff were great.  Patient. Helpful. And successful.  I had no idea how many options and benefits I had coming to me after my injury.  I was injured over time and had a worker's compensation case.  They fought for me.
The best in the business

This has been a nightmare so far dealing with this lawyer.  She has screamed at me several times as well as hung up in my face, because I was trying to obtain information about my case,  if I question anything that she does, that I feel is inadequate or an area of my case that I know to be complex,  I always feel that this firm handles all her worker's comp cases with a cookie cutter approach.  I believe she does this to enable her to hire staff with limited legal experience because they are only required to do the same duties for most, if not all of their clients.  My claim was very complex.  because I worked as a commercial truck driver.  The same laws that apply to most employees don't apply to truck drivers, for one reason or another, usually labor laws are different, as well as the fact that the DOT (Department of Transportation) regulates truckers.  Ms. Yount repeatedly seems to treat my case as she would for a  regular employee, I had a stroke and when I filed a WC case, I was required to see a QME (qualified medical examiner) who said he believed my stroke was work related (twice)  Initially, I was released by all the doctors i had seen in the hospital as well as doctors I was required to see afterward.  I should have been able to return to driving but my job which had terminated me as well as cancelled my medical insurance less than 3 weeks after I had my stroke, told me I had to remain off from work a minimum of 2 years, even though 3 different doctors including 2 neurologist felt I was capable to return to work.  This attorney tried to blame sick, unemployed me for not going and paying for myself a DOT examination, as if that somehow would have forced my job to rehire me.  Now, the complex part is that WC is basically trying to deny my case even though the doctor that WC required me to see, says he believes my injury is work related and normally a person gets paid benefits if the doctors says that, but in my case WC is basically not wanting to honor their own doctors findings because now they say he was not a DOT qualified.doctor. If I was required to see only a DOT  qualified doctor, then that is the kind of doctor they should have sent me to initially. This is what I have been trying so hard to get this law firm to aggressively defend that WC sent me to their doctor, the wrong type of doctor,  Even so,  the QME they did send me to, supports my claim, yet they are trying to blame me for not getting a DOT doctor to examine me.

Kirby and his wife are amazing. I trusted these two with my future, and they got me everything I asked for. Even now, months after my DUI, they still message me back and help me at no cost. You can’t ask for a better lawyer. They are busy, but they take the time to talk to you and truly honor you.

I went with them because they were the most affordable I could possibly find, but God blessed me because these two perform good works and serve their people. They will work so hard for you and earn your trust. I went to them for help, but I know I made two friends I will cherish.

Praise the Lord that there are people who want to help and don’t just work for money.

Listen to them, be guided, and stop drinking—not just because it’s the right thing to do, but because you need to choose not to drink to show the best love you can to those around you. Don’t look back; the past you is dead.

1 Corinthians 13:4-8

Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud. It does not dishonor others, it is not self-seeking, it is not easily angered, it keeps no record of wrongs. Love does not delight in evil but rejoices with the truth. It always protects, always trusts, always hopes, always perseveres. Love never fails.

I am very grateful for meeting Mr. & Mrs. Combs they are very nice and work greatly as a team. Mr. & Mrs. Combs always updated me on my case. They made sure to instruct me properly on what to do with certain forms and anything I had to do on my end. All of my questions were answered and they understood my situation.
Mr. Combs told me something no other lawyer told me, he said he will show up to court on my behalf, knowing I was out of the state. My warrant was removed without me having to be there. The next court date my felony would be dropped which was another court date I did not have to attend. This helped me out tremendously! It would have been very costly for me to travel back and forth since I'm preparing for university. Knowing that, he worked really hard for me to not have to show face.
Thank you very much Mr. & Mrs. Combs. Lovely people, great personalities, I haven't even met them in person and I know this.
To anyone reading I highly recommend this wonderful team!

Kirby represented me on three different issues. The first being a 4 count felony case involving conspiracy. I was the co-defendant and the other defendant was facing a murder charge in a separate case that eventually was all intertwined into one case. The DA was tough, although I was completely unaware of the other defendants doings at that time and I was innocent of any wrongdoings, they charged me with different multiple serious felony counts of involvement because of my relationship with that defendant on a personal level. Kirby was able to get all the felony charges dismissed and reduced to a single misdemeanor disturbing the peace conviction with minimal plea terms, including only 1yr informal probation.

Once the informal probation was up, I then retained Kirby again to have that misdemeanor conviction expunged. Within weeks Kirby had that conviction and record expunged. Weeks later I retained Kirby again to expunge a DUI conviction I received over 10yrs ago. He first attempted to directly ask the DA, they refused to expunge that DUI. Those case expungements are on an individual case basis dismissed by a Judge. So once the DA refused Kirby immediately took my case to a judge and was able to get that DUI expungement for me as well.

I cannot say with words how grateful I am to Kirby and to his wife Kim. Not only did they fight for me every step of the way but they showed true compassion and made sure I was always aware of everything going on. He literally saved my life from charges that could have left me behind bars for a very long time. If you're looking for a criminal defense attorney in Riverside county, look no further. There is no one else you can entrust your case in more than Kirby.

I sealed and destroyed (factual innocence motion) a arrest record I had for a domestic violence charge in February of 2014. The motion was granted by a Riverside County Superior Court Judge and I can now again pass Level 1 (State & Federal) background checks. This is a great criminal defense law firm, I would recommend this firm to anyone seeking representation in the community for any serious criminal matter.
Hands down best lawyer out there. They really go out of there way for you! Thank you guys much appreciated

We highly recommend Kirby Combs for their professionalism and knowledge which provided us with exceptional service through every step of our needs!!  All questions were answered in an extremely timely manner, they were available anytime we needed, cannot thank them enough for everything.

I have dealt with many lawyers in this pass couple of years and I can tell Mr. Kirby is a very passionate and knowledgeable attorney.

After contacting 4 different lawyers trying to get a straight answer for Information for a family Trust only 3 responded back. I was informed to make an appointment for any questions I had which definitely surprised me that not one question I asked could be answered?
It was when I received a call from Ms. Jennifer Venable ( Attorney at Law) who without hesitation answered all my questions with such a professional manner that I was intrigued so much I had to meet  her because she made me feel so comfortable and how pleasant she was over the phone. The day I received a call back from her office (Venable Legacy Planning) by a Ms. Leslie Pettis who was very soft spoken and professional while talking to me setting up a meeting with Ms.Venable. Once there at the appointment with my Fiancé  Ms. Venable approached both of us happily greeting each one of us before introducing us to her staff, everyone was exceptionally polite and friendly. Once in Ms. Venable office she treated us with kindness and respect while going over the questions we talked about earlier over the phone and explained every aspect of the process regarding a family Trust I wanted for my loved one there.
Ms.Venable clearly understood what I wanted and went over everything twice confirming again the complete process on how everything would work regarding the family Trust for myself and Fiancé.
I then received a call a couple days latter from there office by Ms. Leslie Pettis that Ms.Venable had all the paperwork ready for me and my Fiancé to sign with her office Notery dept.
All the paperwork was organized on the desk as Ms. Venable went over every part of each section of the Trust clearing explaining everything in detail as we signed each page having it legally notarized, once everything was completed two days latter we were notified that the folder was completed for me and to make arrangements to come in to review and complete the process making sure I was happy with the outcome and then being given a very nice leather folder highlighting all the details of the Trust.
I want to personally thank the staff of Venable Legacy Planning for their service and dedication to helping me with such an amazing experience, I want to personally thank Ms. Jennifer Venable for her outstanding professional service she showed us at one of her firms located in Hemet Ca. Her good work handling all the paperwork and informing us about her yearly check in with us for any questions we may have for the future and assuring us she will be there every step of the way when needed.
On a scale of professionalism for her firm  and her staff  its 100% excellent, I would without hesitation hire her again in a heart beat for any future legal challenge.

Sincerely,
David Lee Huffman.

reviews.text: Where do I start? I am a disabled Navy veteran 100% rated and live in Hemet, California. I own my own home and take care of my senior mother who is 89 years old, my health, as a disabled veteran has been very challenging with different procedures in the hospital. I never thought about a family trust or a living trust, but realize if I have net worth of asset, a whole lot is going to come off of the top if I don’t have a will and a living trust. What the law office of Jennifer Venable did was to ensure that my loved ones will not have to go through probate! Think about it 10% of your whole estate will be charged for probate lawyers, if you take the time to make the proper paperwork, you will not suffer your loved ones to go through the nightmare of probate.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Joell for your kind words and understanding of how important this process truly is. It has been an incredible pleasure to work with you and your family. reviews.text: Meeting Jennifer, she was so knowledgeable and inspiring. I had no idea that having a Will, will not be sufficient upon leaving this world. reviews.text: I used Parwana Anwar for my criminal case and she was the best thing that happened to me in a very dark time. She and her office was very attentive to all of my concerns and questions. She also gave in depth advise on outside factors that could impact my case. Parwana’s ability to communicate was a stress relief and her knowledge of all subjects that we faced proved her worth many times over. I would highly recommend Parwana to any one that is in need of counsel.
Does not take in consideration of what u need expects you  to make a down payment first with the promise of seeing results those results, but you will get none ,very unprofessional lawyer
Former prosecutors have an edge in doing criminal defense.

Parwana was very professional and was able to reduce my sentence from 2 years of jail time to 2 years probation!! I have used Parwana in the past and never regret it afterwards! If you're looking for a knowledgeable attourney with tons of experience look no further!

Parwana recently handled a case for me involving some serious charges mostly based on untrue information. She is very educated in criminal defense and professional. Parwana was informative, had patience and educated me on the entire court process, and kept me updated throughout the entire process of my case. By the end of the process, she got all of the serious charges I was facing dismissed. Parwana is an excellent criminal defense attorney, and I am extremely grateful I had her defending me. I hope to never need this type of service again, but if I did, I would be going straight to Parwana’s law offices. I would recommend her to anyone needing the service of a criminal defense attorney.

Took my money and did nothing for me. Not a thing. And then overcharged me when I let them go early to justify the full $10000 and I hadn't even made it through my second conference. And they never even discussed my case with the da for $9000, go find another attorney. These are crooks.
reviews.ownerResponse:
After reviewing the evidence in your case and advising you of the risks of a conviction, you did not want to hear my advice and insisted on going to trial. We explained that our retainer fee never includes a jury trial (something you signed and agreed to when we were retained), and you indicated that you wanted the same attorney to handle your preliminary hearing, as well as conduct your jury trial. You then hired new counsel. This was after multiple court appearances, reviewing extensive evidence, including body worn camera videos and police reports. We invoiced you very reasonably for our time spent and offered you a refund of a portion of the retainer fee. You were not happy about that and then decided to threaten me with a bar complaint and leave me this review. I undertstand that you just wanted someone to tell you what you wanted to hear, however, as an attorney experienced in criminal law for over 25 years, sometimes criminal clients don't like hearing that the evidence is not in their favor. Despite your threats, I wished you the best of luck with your case.

Every client I represent will always be told the truth about the evidence, as I never sugar-coat anything to get hired or to make money. Every client deserves to know the risks of jury trial based on my years of experience. I know that did not make you happy, as this review demonstrates.

reviews.text: Attorney Parwana Anwar is one of the hardest working and most caring criminal defense advocates in Southern California. As a fellow defense attorney, I have collaborated on a number of cases with Ms. Anwar, seeing firsthand her dedication to fighting for her clients to ensure that their rights are protected every step of the way throughout the process.  With well over two decades of experience, you can rest assured Ms. Anwar is prepared to take on even the most challenging cases, approaching each and every situation with the highest degree of integrity and professionalism.  Ms. Anwar always pays careful attention to detail, and quickly develops a strategic plan specifically tailored to the unique needs of each case and client.  She is well respected by her peers in the legal community, by our local judges, and by her valued clientele.  I cannot recommend her highly enough as an exceptional choice for all of your criminal defense needs.

(TERRIBLE ATTORNEY)BEWARE!!!!!! I first wanted to start off by stating I went with parwana based off her great reviews, but I fear that a lot of those reviews are not real. First let me say she took my case all 6,000 up front. When I went to meet her and pay her I should have seen first red flag,she wouldn’t shake my hand. Bad business ethics. I then called her the next day scared and concerned as some information she had said mixed with what was told to me upfront. She instantly started yelling at me accusing me of calling her a crook. I would never call her that nor was I thinking that , all I had said was very nicely we just payed a lot of money and I’m concerned…. She blew up . From day one I felt like she was against me after that incident. The phone conversation with her was unbearable she just kept wanting to over power me and make her point , I felt so uneasy and uncomfortable. Like this attorney is shady. But I kept her because I was scared I have never had this situation before. She from then on out did little to nothing to try and defend me , she even went as far is to walk and talk with the man we were fighting against. Everyone that’s a big red flag!!!! Your attorney should never talk to the other party let alone the individual. Any other law firm sends out a private investigator to do that . Not her . In court she said but a few words. A month later I called to see how my case was going , she didn’t even know who I was and told me she didn’t look over my case as she had a big murder  case. Finally week later she called me up told me I had little options and to just take a deal . Lied about videos she saw as there is only one , not two and if she had watched it she would of seen  I was innocent and it was worth fighting . But she never watched it and clearly wanted to just get it over with for a quick pay out . I ended up firing her and going with someone else . There was no refund and she did nothing but make me feel like I was a horrible person she disliked and wanted to make a quick buck off. Just by my new attorneys actions it is a case worth fighting for and he sends proper emails formally noted . Parwana Anwar is in fact a crook and it showed the day she accused me of calling her one without me even saying anything . She also does not have the ability to show compassion. I do not recommend her at all as she picks and chooses how she will treat you and just take your money ! Never go with a ex DA , I learned the hard way! Stay with strictly criminal defense attorneys who didn’t work for the other side!!!!!!!
Parwana Anwar will take your money and do next to nothing .
reviews.ownerResponse: I have never represented this individual.  Every case I take and client that I represent is given my full attention in reviewing their evidence and providing them with my opinion based on my 25 years of experience as a former prosecutor and criminal defense attorney.  I will tirelessly represent every client to the best of my ability, and will never put money above providing clients with a detail-oriented, honest defense.

reviews.text: I came across Parwana's profile through a Google Search. I went through a list of at least 10 other attorney's and called each one of them. Many of those lawyers I spoke with sounded like they knew what they were doing and had a lot of experience. But Parwana's thorough explanation about the entire process, the details she provided, her knowledge and experience stood out right away. Wow... where do I start? From the first time she met with me while I was in custody, I remember her sitting contently listening to “my story”, and how I got into the situation I was in. reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Mike. Although my retainer is normally an up front flat fee, you asked if you could make payments, and I decided to make an exception for you. Not only did we open a file in your case, we sent out letters of representation and requested the discovery on your case, as well as a stay on any action in your case. We also began monitoring your case for filing and reviewed your discovery. In addition, I communicated with you several times via both email and phone. When it came time for you to make your payment, you were unable to make it. You then contacted my office and indicated you did not have the money to retain me and wanted a refund. Although my initial consultations are absolutely free, I do charge for any time I spend on your case once I am retained for my services. I had to then send letters of withdrawal on your case and close out your file. I calculated my time on your case and created an invoice for you (for which you were also not billed, although it took a substantial amount of time to calculate). Even with the small initial deposit you put down, I sent you a refund of the money remaining, without any hesitation. Although it may not have been all of your retainer, I do charge for my time and services once I am retained. I also charge based on my level of expertise and years of experience in my field—20 years.

I actually never represented you in court or in your hearing because you did not have the funds to retain me and told me you could not proceed with the retainer before your case got to court or to any hearing. It was unfortunate that you could not proceed with my representation, because I have been successful in several cases like yours and have not only won at trial but have gotten cases like yours dismissed prior to trial. Despite this, I sincerely hope you were able to get a positive outcome on your case.

Parwana Anwar is an excellent communicator, also Jennifer in the office was very helpful whenever I called and had questions. I was always informed of anything that was going on with my case, even if it was just a continuation on my case. Parwana always advocated my rights, and was prepared in court. She was able to obtain the body camera footage from the officer who lied on his police report essentially about everything. If you are reading this review, chances are you’re in the same position I was in a few months ago. You’re scared & worried, and you’re searching for a rock-star attorney to help with your impending criminal case. Well, look no further, Parwana is the real-deal! Never even having one brush-in with the law my entire life prior, I suddenly found myself in a dangerous situation. After an incident that was blown out of proportion, I was arrested for felony domestic violence/assault. As a single parent, if convicted, I faced not only jail time, but also losing my job and custody of my children. I began scouring the internet, looking up reviews for the best criminal defense attorney in the area. There were a few other lawyers that popped up before Parwana, but for some reason, I was drawn to her. The reviews were excellent, but the fact she was a former prosecutor for the Riverside County District Attorney’s Office, where she gained tons of trial experience, was even more appealing to me. Working on the opposite side of the law, she prosecuted cases like mine for years, and I felt confident she knew exactly how both sides of the legal system worked. I called Parwana to set up a consultation, and after talking to her and explaining the situation, I retained her services the same day. A few phone calls, and email exchanges later, Parwana contacted the DA’s office and submitted evidence for the case on my behalf. Approximately 1 week later, she received a response back from the DA. The DA was not going to press any charges against me, and the case was dismissed! This was the best possible outcome, and I was thrilled! I never had to meet Parwana in person, and because the case was dropped before my scheduled court date, I didn’t have to appear in court. It was that easy! Unfortunately, a few months later, I was arrested again, and found myself facing felony criminal charges a second time. I knew just the person to call, and I contacted Parwana right away. This time around, I met with her in person to go over all the details. Even though my prior case was dismissed, she explained this time would be a bit more challenging because the DA’s office would most likely have my last case file fresh on their minds. She made no promises on the outcome, but did assure me she would try her best to keep the punishment to a minimal. Shortly after our meeting, Parwana again submitted my case information to the DA’s office in attempt to at least get the charges reduced prior to my scheduled court date. And, again about 1 week later, the DA responded. I was absolutely shocked when Parwana told me that the DA was NOT going to file any charges, and due to lack of evidence, the case was dismissed! Parwana pulled it off twice! She is a miracle worker, and I am forever grateful for what she has done for me. This has been the hardest year of my life, yet it could’ve been so much worse. With the help of Parwana and her expertise, she saved me from what could have been two life ruining events. Parwana does not disappoint. You can’t afford to NOT hire her!

Parwana is talented, period! She has excellent verbal skills, she is honest with her clients, and goes above and beyond when the timing is right. Most attorneys will sugar coat their perspective, however Parwana stays focus on the task at hand and takes it one step at a time until the job is well done. If you end up working Parwana, you should feel protected. We are super grateful to know her!!!!

I began my search for a criminal defense lawyer back in March when I was charged with a 2nd DUI. I was drawn to Attorney Parwana Anwar because of her outstanding online reviews and impressive work experience.

After initially contacting Attorney Parwana Anwar and introducing myself, I felt a tremendous amount of stress relieved from my shoulders. I gave her a brief explanation of my situation and all the details to my knowledge. She then introduced herself and gave us an impressive insight of her professional background.

Once we sat down and reviewed my case in depth together, Attorney Parwana explained the charges filed against me and the errors she saw in my case. She then explained how the prosecutor's office could try to go about our case and how we could select the best strategy for my defense.

She then went on to explain how the DMV would have its own legal process and hearings. Attorney Parwana was very thorough with all the information that was coming in, she was very informative and super knowledgeable. Any questions that I had she answered immediately and confidently.

After three long months, back in June we finally went to court in Murrieta. The morning of court several thoughts were racing through my head and the outcomes that could happen. Attorney Parwana gave an outstanding defense. When we were in court she dismantled the prosecutor's office apart. It was clear that she worked very hard on my case and had every answer thought out. She was able to prove that I was innocent and had my 2nd DUI case dismissed.

Attorney Parwana and her team were very empathetic and attentive throughout the whole process. Her office called and kept me well informed with all the DMV hearings and any new information that came into the courthouse. Attorney Parwana also let me know when the police report was turned in.

Once again, I would like to state how I am forever grateful for what Attorney Parwana Anwar was able to accomplish for me. I will most definitely recommend her to any family or friends who seek and an outstanding attorney. Or anyone who needs legal advice really. Honestly, I know that when you are facing legal matters in life it can get extremely stressful. Please don’t hesitate to contact her and her team. She is the very best!

Our hearts are filled with gratitude and appreciation for the outstanding service we received from Attorney Steven Bliss when we met with him in his San Diego office.  We desperately needed some expert advice and direction regarding the distribution of property assets from a family trust.

We found Attorney Bliss after spending several hours reviewing YELP comments about a number of possible attorneys to contact.  One of the attorneys that continually received 5-Star ratings was Attorney Bliss.  He has over 100 5-Star YELP reviews in one account alone! The one that convinced us to contact him was written by Elly D. who noted, "He is honest, trustworthy, direct, knowledgeable/intelligent, genuine, professional and supportive."  When we read the words "honest" and "trustworthy," in addition to the other positive listed traits,  we wanted him for our attorney.  We then hoped he still had some openings and would be able to meet with us soon.

When we contacted him and shared our dilemma with him, he agreed that  our situation was urgent.  Despite the holiday season and his already impacted schedule, he went out of his way to add us as clients.  Within two weeks we were warmly welcomed into his office.  He walked us through the family trust and asked us direct questions regarding the disbursement of the property.  What we especially appreciated about our time with him was his skill to explain the trust/will laws to us, his candidness about the tender and sensitive dilemma we were facing, his words "you now have an obligation to the beneficiaries listed in the will," and his willingness to take on our case as we move forward in bringing the trust to closure.  Moreover, he provided us with a plausible win-win solution to the dilemma we were facing.

As we walked out of his office, we felt an incredible sense of relief.  We now had the specific tool we needed to move forward, and Attorney Bliss assured us that he would assist us in the legal process ahead.  We wholeheartedly add our 5-Star review to the myriad of others that have been submitted in his behalf.  He is the best of the best!

My husband died on the first of December, 2018.  I was totally depressed for at least three months, with no idea what to do next.  A good friend passed along a two hour video for me to look at, showing a class on Wills, Trusts, Estate planning, etc.  After viewing the video, I thought on it for at least a week, then watched it again, making notes.  After thinking on it for two more days, watched the class again, and was totally convinced that a Revocable Living Trust would be just what I needed to ease my mind.  I then contacted Mr. Bliss and met with him at his office.  We discussed things, and agreed to create a Revocable Living Trust for the financial future .  Then, by the next meeting I was able to fill out his listing of all the assets to include in the Revocable Living  Trust.  At that time a partial payment of the cost of the creation was made.  Mr. Bliss sent me a draft of the trust document, noting which items I should review and make any changes.  I called Mr. Bliss and mentioned the adjustments, which he did over the phone.  Our last meeting was a delight, signing all the paperwork, looking at all the information, Mr. Bliss gave me directions on what to do next, and I wrote his check for the final amount of his cost of completing my Trust, walking away happily with a better feeling than I had in many months.  I was delighted with his expertise and kindness, also with his quick understanding of what had to be done.  If there’s ever a time I need an Attorney for advice, he will be getting my call.
Sincerely,        Nancy H. Grams

I had the unfortunate experience of being sold a 419 plan through a previously retained CPA and it consequently becoming a listed transaction by the IRS and subject to audit.  I had gone to three other tax attorneys prior to finding Mark Lobb and they were absolutely useless. They were more interested in collecting fees and their interest was their own. Mark on the other hand did exactly what he said he was going to do and very promptly.  Not only did he challenge the IRS, he mitigated the audit and got 90% of the money paid to FTB returned to me and reduced the penalty and fines with the IRS.

If you are looking for a tax attorney with integrity, character and unsurpassed morality, look no further.  From the onset, Marks interest was helping us stop the harassment and turn the tables back to the erroneously performed audit and holding perpetrators accountable for their actions.  The money and fees took a backseat to the situation and Mark performed brilliantly.  As a business owner with over 300 employees I have dealt with a lot of attorneys and situations that require engagement of our legal system.  I have never encountered another attorney who took such a personal interest and performed exactly as promised.  It was refreshing to work with a man who's word and honesty are not only exemplified in his practice, but in the manner he lives his life.
Thank you Mark!

reviews.text: I wouldn’t go for them. They seemed nice at first but charging money for consultation for a case that they knew they wouldn’t/couldn’t help is just not honest. I spoke to an attorney that was straightforward and didn’t charge me a dime to tell me all information that I can’t prove this case. They gave me some hope at the beginning and I didn’t mind to pay for consultation or if there were legal fees to move forward because I looked for justice and not compensation or expecting any money back. I just wanted to understand more and agreed to pay for expert but that didn’t do anything. It was just speculations. I did not get answer as why the terms(my dog got brain damaged was not on the report). I understand business needs to charge consultation to move forward and I completely understand but they knew I couldn’t prove anything so why offer consultation in the first place. The other attorney was short and simple and it’s hard to prove my case. I am glad there are honest people out there and it’s just not with this firm or at least in my case .
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Linh, We are pretty shocked and saddened to see your review. We charge for consultations, which we never schedule if it does not appear to be a case we could potentially assist with, because we spend significant time reviewing the case (all documents and a write up) in advance of the call and more time on the phone (usually 30-45 minutes) going over all legal avenues, potential damages, and facts. We request all documents prior to our consultation call so we can review in advance of the consultation, which we did in your case. Our normal hourly rates range from $385 to $450, but we only charge $195 for consultations which generally take at least an hour or more of our time. In other words, our consultations are at a significantly discounted rate. It seems you are disappointed because, during our consultation, we became concerned that the facts were not strong enough to prove your case. However, you requested our expert review to provide more insight. Our expert then reviewed your case and did not feel you had a strong case but did provide information regarding your companion's illness/hospitalization. Based on her review, we were concerned you would spend more in legal fees than you would recover. We are very sorry for your loss, but do not believe that this review is fair or accurate. We are glad you found an attorney who is willing to assist at no charge. We advised from the very beginning that we do not offer consultations for free and that we could not take the case pro bono. As we told you in our follow up email after our call and expert review were completed, we did not feel that you had a strong enough case upon our review and could not in good faith move forward representing you.

reviews.text:
Ryther Law Group provided my family and I with an exceptional legal service and support during a challenging time. Their team demonstrated remarkable expertise and professionalism, guiding us through every step of the process with clarity and confidence.

From the first consultation, it was evident that they genuinely cared about our case and for the well-being of our Bubba. Marc Robinson and Sarah Thompson, took the time to understand our situation in detail and provided a clear, strategic plan of action. Their communication was always prompt and transparent, keeping us informed and reassured throughout the entire process.

What sets Ryther Law Group apart is their unwavering dedication to their clients. They fought diligently for Bubba’s rights and achieved a result that exceeded our expectations. Their attention to detail and comprehensive approach made all the difference.

I am incredibly grateful for the outstanding service I received from Ryther Law Group. They will forever hold a special place in our lives.
--

reviews.text:
I’ve not met a more qualified, easy to work with, responsive and results driven attorney than Jake Stipp. Even though my case wasn’t close to being his biggest, he never made me feel less important than his other cases.
His professionalism, ability to handle the opposition and knowledge of the law makes him the best in his field.
If you want someone you can count on and trust to be your advocate and representative, Jake is your guy. My wife and I highly recommend him!

I can’t recommend Jacob and the Stripps Law Firm enough! After my injury, I went through some really difficult moments, but Jacob and his team never stopped advocating for me. Their compassion, patience, and respect made such a difference, and they genuinely cared about my well-being. We achieved a fantastic outcome in my case, and I am forever grateful for their guidance and support.
As a former Temecula resident it was a pleasure to work with Jake on a case regarding my mother and what a relief for me to know she was going to be okay. Fully recommend this firm.

Found myself in a very odd position when the county changed the parcel numbers on my street; they withdrew money out of my mortgage, impound account for my old parcel number, and my new parcel number, meaning I paid taxes for my property and my neighbors. This caused my monthly mortgage bill to increase about $800 a month. I went back-and-forth with my mortgage company and the county for over a year with no results. At my wits end, I reached out to singleton-Smith law offices and they sent a letter to the county And my mortgage broker; within three weeks I had my money back and everything fixed. Thank you again, singleton-Smith law offices!

if I could give them zero stars, I would! DO NOT use this office unless you want to lose your case. I had to drop them 2 months after initiating my divorce process due to their lack of competence. They are very quick to want your money but once I retained them, my interests were not protected as they should have been. I provided them all the information necessary for them to have protected me and they still did not. My ex ended up selling the marital home without my consent while their process server (I used their service per their suggestion) attempted to serve my ex and all he did was show up at his front door, ring the door bell several times and that was the extent of the service. My ex was never going to answer that door as he knew he had the house in escrow already. I provided them with his work address and no attempt was ever made to serve him there. I even offered to assist and never got a call from the server. Then in the 2 short months, I have had 2 different paralegals and the 2nd one is no longer there. Their attorney Michael attempted to assist me after I complained to their Client Relations Manager but by then it was too late, our house had been sold, my ex got all the funds and he refuses to put them in a trust account. Any damage control was futile at this point. I had to seek another attorney who will properly represent me. This office is a mess to say the least!

reviews.text:
⭐ Disappointing Experience

I retained this law office to assist with finalizing my divorce and child support matter. While my case initially progressed smoothly, my experience changed after it was reassigned within the firm.

Communication became limited, and I primarily interacted with staff rather than directly with the attorney responsible for my case. I raised concerns that I believed were important to the outcome and requested additional action; however, from my perspective, those issues were not pursued as I expected.

At the court hearing, I believed the case was strongly supported by the information and documentation I had provided. However, I felt my case was not presented with the level of preparation I had anticipated, especially considering the fees charged. I was billed approximately $16,500 for about two and a half months of representation, and I expected clearer communication, stronger preparation, and more consistent advocacy.

Legal matters like divorce and child support are extremely difficult for families and children involved. During such an important time, I was hoping for more guidance, preparation, and support throughout the process.

Choosing the right attorney matters deeply, and I hope my experience helps others make a fully informed decision before moving forward.
Professional, gets the job done. She helped me with my divorce and got me what through everything even when I was feeling hopeless.  Happy with the results.

Neda is a terrible attorney who should be disbarred for dishonesty. Personally dealing with her as Pro Per  against my ex husband. She is so bad that my husband and I are going to team up (first time ever since the divorce) to give the California Bar Association all of our documents. We have been trying to settle and her office keeps avoiding it in order to rack up more money from my soon to be ex husband. We have emails from both sides asking her to put very specific wording in a stipulation to avoid future confusion and 3 times she has purposely wrote it wrong and continues to bill my ex husband for repeat services to send the same document. It’s seems as though I’m not the only one that says this reading recent reviews from others.  Good thing we can come together for a good cause. There are plenty of better more honest, attorneys out there. Even her associate attorney knows she is dishonest. He was the one handling our case and working with us and she sent me an email saying she will be overseeing everything he does. Really lady that seems like trust issue to me.  Anyway please avoid if you don’t want to pay and exuberance for terrible representation.

It wasn't easy since California makes everything MUCH more difficult but Neda and her team got me through it. I sought Neda's firm for a civil matter and having had some experience with retaining attorneys for  Family Law it was such a shock to finally be listened to, heard and understood. Her office staff are impeccably professional and responsive. Neda takes the center stage with confidence, intelligence and appropriate application of the law with careful navigation of the case. Balancing that with kindness, her genuine interest in her clients was such a refreshing change as she made me feel like a person instead of another request for order on her desk. I saw a great deal of humanity in her which I have seen lacking in other attorneys with whom I've worked with in my family law matter. I pray the day won't come but know it will someday when I have to deal with some finishing business on one family law matter we have left and definitely would call Neda again in a heartbeat to request her at the helm again. Highly recommend!

I really liked my experience with Neda and her whole office. She is the attorney you'll work with, but for the most part you'll work with the paralegals. I LOVED her paralegal, Edward. I loved him! He was very knowledgeable, thorough, understanding, had a kind and soothing voice to help with the times when the stress really kicks in, because we all know family law comes with a ton of anxiety and stress. Attorneys are NEVER cheap, but Neda was less per hour than all the others I had meetings with first. I had a lot that came along with my case, while it was still expensive, in the case of my legal fees, I think I came out ok. I also want to talk about how Neda seemed to really care about the kids involved more than the feelings of us parents. Not to say she doesn't care about us, but she makes it clear how bad she feels for the kids involved and how important it is to get what is best for them. That is really important, especially as I look back. While we absolutely want to win our cases, she will also be pretty upfront and almost blunt about what is best for the kids. In the long run, that will be what saves money, because she know what the judges will want and be looking for, so there won't be as much need to be in and out of court. While being matter of fact and blunt may seem like something we don't want in an attorney, it really is good because we typically are so wrapped up in hurt and anger during these types of cases, so we don't always look and the full picture to know what is best for our kids. She has a lot of experience in other areas of Law as well, so that will help if the parent you're going to court with has had past issues with the law.

Too expensive for the services rendered. The only reason why I had to get a lawyer was because my ex is impossible to deal with. My ex dragged the court process and I ended up paying more money due to this. Then instead of being more supportive of my needs and financial struggles, it felt as if my lawyer was more attentive to my ex’s needs and desires. It felt as if predisposed ideas were made and I should have received a more impartial hearing. I worked extra hard my whole life to provide a good life for my kids and her, but she never wanted to work, it was always me working. When I got fed up and decide to leave, the laws, the courts, even my lawyer (this one and the previous one) seem all to side with her. I need a break, I live paycheck to paycheck trying to survive, while she can cry and get what she wants. It is ridiculous and very unfair.

Long story short, I required Nedas legal services after dealing with a very long, difficult expensive, and bitter custody case. The Attorney I had working for me prior to Neda was great up to a certain point, but by the next phase of the Case, I needed a specific type of lawyer that utilized not only a  different approach and tactics, but someone who is well respected among the Judges and other Attorneys. Yes, that kind of stuff will make a difference in your case. After the very first hearing with Neda as my Attorney, literally the case did a complete 180 in my favor, everything has been resolved and most importantly my family is UNITED and together. If this is your first time dealing with Divorce/Custody let me tell you this: Family Court Sucks, Its expensive, stressful, and a nightmare. Do your research on Attorneys, be prepared to spend A LOT, and if you can, really try to resolve your problems before they get to court. The Kids deserve Two parents who can get put their problems aside and get along. Thank you Neda and all her Staff! My Family absolutely appreciates all you have done to help us!

reviews.text:
I'm going to just state the facts from my own experience dealing with this firm.
I fired this lawyer after she had lied to my face three different occasions.
The first was when Mrs. Neda had stated that she had been doing family law for a long time. This is false as she has only had her licence to practice law in CA for five years. licence #303790
The second was when Neda told me I wouldn't win against the TRO even when I found out later I would have. I had no police record, and I never had any negative dealings with the police prior to the divorce.
The third lie was when she charged me for reading emails when she did not. Because if she had read them she would have discovered the please respond at the end of the emails. Which Mrs Neda did not respond to.

I felt disrespected from her lack of social professionalism of talking over me. Mrs Neda's constant dismissal of my reasonable requests for her to provide legal courses of action by means of giving me a creepy smile and just sitting there. I felt disrespected as a former member of the military. I did not feel respected for being a client that kept her employed. I noticed the awards displayed in her office had no sponsor names on them. Mrs. Neda had me submit payments into a trust so she could collect tax free income without a single cent being discounted for me the employer. I noticed when receiving the case file Mrs. Neda had begun her own investigation into fiances to divide when there was never a request for her to do this. I felt as a father and educated person Mrs. Neda was working for the opposition than my interests. After reading the reviews I have found myself to not be the only one who felt as if my interests were not being addressed. Mrs Neda quickly discontinued communication with me pushing me off on an intern Gary who was consistently dismissive and unresponsive. I have learned that Mrs. Neda is known as "Neda the nag" by other lawyers I have had the opportunity to speak with. As example, if she is confronted by opposition without a lawyer she will harass them instead of using proper legal avenues. When confronted by any experienced lawyer as in my case I found her acting in the oppositions best interest to curry favor with opposing council. I will be submitting a attorney misconduct complaint.
reviews.ownerResponse: The same review has been left on Yelp under the name “Shawn H.” We have not represented a “Shawn H” or a “John Smith”. We dispute the details in this review as we strive to provide the best possible representation for our clients throughout what is likely one of the most difficult times in their lives. Additionally, there are several misstatements in this review. Per the state bar of CA, money received for hourly retainers are held in an Attorney-Client Trust account until invoiced. Finally, our office does not hire interns and we do not have any employees named Gary.
